_**Agent (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-13 11:31:22Z)**_

접속 방법은 로컬 `.env`의 `DEPLOY_HOST` 값(`user@host`, 예: Tailscale 주소)으로 SSH하는 구조예요.

```powershell
ssh $env:DEPLOY_HOST   # 또는 .env에 적힌 jeon@호스트주소 그대로
```

그 뒤 서버에서:
```bash
cd ~/apps/resume-pilot
./scripts/resume-pilot.sh deploy   # 또는 이미 떠있으면 상태만 확인
docker compose ps
```

`.env` 파일이 git에 없으니 실제 `DEPLOY_HOST` 값은 로컬 `.env`에서 확인하셔야 합니다 (보안상 제가 값을 출력하진 않을게요). 확인해서 SSH 접속 시도해 보시겠어요, 아니면 `.env`에 `DEPLOY_HOST`가 이미 채워져 있는지부터 확인해 드릴까요?

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-13 11:36:34Z)**_

"DBeaver: TAILSCALE_HOST:POSTGRES_PORT / resumepilot / resumepilot" 주석이 힌트네요 — Tailscale로 우분투 서버 DB(포트 55532)에 이미 외부 접속 가능하게 열려 있습니다.

로컬 개발 시 Windows Docker DB 대신 우분투 DB에 붙으려면, `resume-api` 실행 전 환경변수만 오버라이드하면 됩니다.

```powershell
$env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL = "jdbc:postgresql://<우분투_Tailscale주소>:55532/resumepilot"
$env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME = "resumepilot"
$env:SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD = "<우분투 .env의 실제 POSTGRES_PASSWORD>"
```

이렇게 설정 후 `.\gradlew.bat bootRun` 하면 됩니다. `<우분투_Tailscale주소>`는 `tailscale status`로 확인하시거나 이미 아시는 Tailscale IP/호스트명을 쓰시면 됩니다. 비밀번호 값은 우분투 서버의 `~/apps/resume-pilot/.env`에서 확인하셔야 해요 (여기선 값을 출력하지 않습니다).

매번 치기 번거로우면 `scripts/load-env-local.ps1`에 이 값들을 조건부로 넣거나, 별도 `.env.remote-db` 같은 파일을 만들어 로드하는 방법도 있는데 — 이렇게 스크립트화해드릴까요, 아니면 지금은 수동으로 설정해보시겠어요?

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `E:\workspace\resume-pilot\resume-api\src\main\java\com\resumepilot\global\config\AdminInitializer.java`

```text
1	package com.resumepilot.global.config;
2	
3	import com.resumepilot.domain.user.User;
4	import com.resumepilot.domain.user.UserRepository;
5	import com.resumepilot.domain.user.UserRole;
6	import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
7	import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
8	import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
9	import org.springframework.boot.ApplicationRunner;
10	import org.springframework.security.crypto.password.PasswordEncoder;
11	import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
12	import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
13	
14	/** ADMIN_EMAIL 설정 시 기동 때 관리자 계정 생성·승격 */
15	@Slf4j
16	@Component
17	@RequiredArgsConstructor
18	public class AdminInitializer implements ApplicationRunner {
19	
20	    private final UserRepository userRepository;
21	    private final PasswordEncoder passwordEncoder;
22	
23	    @Value("${ADMIN_EMAIL:}")
24	    private String adminEmail;
25	
26	    @Value("${ADMIN_PASSWORD:}")
27	    private String adminPassword;
28	
29	    @Override
30	    @Transactional
31	    public void run(org.springframework.boot.ApplicationArguments args) {
32	        if (adminEmail.isBlank()) {
33	            return;
34	        }
35	
36	        userRepository.findByEmail(adminEmail).ifPresentOrElse(user -> {
37	            if (user.getRole() != UserRole.ADMIN) {
38	                user.setRole(UserRole.ADMIN);
39	                userRepository.save(user);
40	                log.info("기존 사용자를 관리자로 승격: {}", adminEmail);
41	            }
42	        }, () -> {
43	            if (adminPassword.isBlank()) {
44	                log.warn("ADMIN_PASSWORD가 없어 관리자 계정을 생성하지 않음: {}", adminEmail);
45	                return;
46	            }
47	            userRepository.save(User.builder()
48	                    .email(adminEmail)
49	                    .passwordHash(passwordEncoder.encode(adminPassword))
50	                    .role(UserRole.ADMIN)
51	                    .build());
52	            log.info("관리자 계정 생성: {}", adminEmail);
53	        });
54	    }
55	}
56
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
35	    r"(?:\[?\s*)?([가-힣A-Za-z0-9]+(?:전자|그룹|증권|은행|카드|화재|생명|손해보험|모터스|자동차|건설|중공업|제약|바이오|소프트|테크|테크놀로지|커뮤니케이션|네트웍스|네트워크|엔터|엔터테인먼트|게임즈|스튜디오|랩|랩스|코퍼레이션|코리아|Korea|Inc\.?|Corp\.?))\s*(?:\]|\||채용|모집)",
36	    r"([가-힣A-Za-z0-9]+)\s*(?:에서|의)\s*(?:함께|일할|근무)",
37	]
38	
39	POSITION_PATTERNS = [
40	    r"(?:직무|포지션|모집분야|채용분야)\s*[:\：]?\s*([^\n]+)",
41	    r"([가-힣A-Za-z/\s]+(?:개발자|엔지니어|디자이너|기획자|PM|매니저|분석가|연구원))\s*(?:모집|채용|구함)",
42	]
43	
44	SKILL_SECTION_PATTERNS = [
45	    r"(?:필수|요구)\s*(?:사항|조건|기술)[:\：]?\s*([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\s*(?:우대|선호|지원|근무|복리|채용|전형|주요|담당|※|$))",
46	    r"(?:우대|선호)\s*(?:사항|조건|기술|요건)[:\：]?\s*([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\s*(?:필수|지원|근무|복리|채용|전형|주요|담당|※|$))",
47	    r"지원\s*자격[:\：]?\s*([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\s*(?:우대|선호|근무|복리|채용|전형|주요|담당|※|$))",
48	    r"자격\s*요건[:\：]?\s*([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\s*(?:우대|선호|근무|복리|채용|전형|주요|담당|※|$))",
49	]
50	
51	RESPONSIBILITY_SECTION_PATTERNS = [
52	    r"(?:담당\s*업무|주요\s*업무)[:\：]?\s*([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\s*(?:자격|필수|우대|지원|근무|복리|채용|전형|※|$))",
53	]
54	
55	JOB_EXTRACTION_SYSTEM = """You extract structured data from Korean or English job postings.
56	The input may be clean text, HTML text, PDF text, OCR output, or a recruitment poster image.
57	
58	Return ONLY valid JSON with these keys:
59	- company_name (string — legal name OR the most specific organization label visible on the poster)
60	- position (string or null)
61	- qualifications (array — education, years-of-experience-only lines, licenses; NOT skill/experience bullets)
62	- required_skills (array — bullets from 지원 자격/자격요건/필수사항/필수 조건 sections)
63	- preferred_skills (array — REQUIRED. bullets from 우대사항/우대요건/우대 조건만; if that section exists, do NOT return [])
64	- tech_keywords (array — stack/product tokens only: languages, frameworks, DB, infra, dr.* names; lowercase; NOT full sentences)
65	- job_responsibilities (array — bullets from 주요업무/담당업무/업무내용 only)
66	- talent_profile (array — 인재상 keywords)
67	- core_competencies (array — soft skills only, NOT job duties)
68	- org_culture (string or null)
69	- job_description (string — 3-5 sentence summary; do NOT paste bullets from other fields)
70	
71	Section mapping (use visible headers):
72	- 주요업무/담당업무 → job_responsibilities
73	- 지원 자격/자격요건/필수사항 → required_skills (education-only lines → qualifications)
74	- 우대사항/우대요건 → preferred_skills
75	- Stack grids / dr.* products → tech_keywords (tokens only)
76	
77	Consistency and deduplication:
78	- Keep each source bullet in ONE primary field only.
79	- Do NOT repeat the same sentence across qualifications, required_skills, preferred_skills, or job_responsibilities.
80	- Do NOT copy 담당업무 into preferred_skills (even with "경험" appended).
81	- Do NOT put full skill bullets into tech_keywords; extract tokens (e.g. "java", "llm", "dr.cms").
82	- job_description summarizes; it must not duplicate bullet lists from other fields.
83	- Preserve original bullet wording when possible; avoid merging or paraphrasing.
84	- Fix obvious OCR typos (Spr1ng → Spring). Do NOT invent facts.
85	- Korean strings except tech_keywords."""
86	
87	VISION_USER_PROMPT = (
88	    "This image is a Korean/English job posting poster or screenshot. "
89	    "Map each visible section header to exactly one JSON field: "
90	    "주요업무/담당업무 → job_responsibilities; "
91	    "지원 자격/자격요건/필수사항 → required_skills; "
92	    "우대사항/우대요건 → preferred_skills; "
93	    "dr.* product grid → tech_keywords (tokens only). "
94	    "Do NOT duplicate the same bullet across fields. "
95	    "job_description is a short summary only, not a bullet dump. "
96	    "Keep original bullet text where possible."
97	)
98	
99	
100	class JobAnalysisService:
101	    async def analyze(
102	        self,
103	        source_type: str,
104	        content: str,
105	        source_url: str | None = None,
106	        file_base64: str | None = None,
107	        mime_type: str | None = None,
108	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
109	        st = source_type.upper()
110	
111	        if st == "IMAGE" and file_base64:
112	            return await self._analyze_image(file_base64, mime_type, st)
113	
114	        text = content or ""
115	        extraction_method = "text"
116	
117	        if st == "URL" and source_url:
118	            text = await self._fetch_url(source_url) or text
119	            extraction_method = "url"
120	        elif st == "PDF" and file_base64:
121	            text = await asyncio.to_thread(self._extract_pdf_base64, file_base64) or text
122	            extraction_method = "pdf"
123	
124	        text = self._normalize_text(text)
125	        if not text:
126	            return {"error": "empty content", "company_name": "Unknown", "source_type": source_type}
127	
128	        return await self._analyze_text(text, extraction_method, source_type)
129	
130	    async def _analyze_image(
131	        self,
132	        file_base64: str,
133	        mime_type: str | None,
134	        source_type: str,
135	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
136	        vision_result: dict[str, Any] | None = None
137	        vision_model: str | None = None
138	
139	        if await self._can_use_llm():
140	            vision_raw, vision_model = await self._vision_extract(file_base64, mime_type)
141	            if vision_raw:
142	                vision_result = self._finalize_fields(
143	                    vision_raw,
144	                    source_text=vision_raw.get("job_description", ""),
145	                    extraction_method="vision",
146	                    source_type=source_type,
147	                    model=vision_model,
148	                )
149	                if is_quality_result(vision_result):
150	                    return vision_result
151	
152	        # 여기 도달 = Vision 부재 또는 품질 미달. OCR 경로는 보조 수단으로만 사용하고,
153	        # Vision 결과가 있으면 빈 필드를 채우는 병합만 한다 (전체 덮어쓰기 금지).
154	        ocr_text = await asyncio.to_thread(self._extract_image_text, file_base64) or ""
155	        ocr_text = self._normalize_text(ocr_text)
156	
157	        if ocr_text and await self._can_use_llm():
158	            llm_result = await self._analyze_text(ocr_text, "ocr", source_type)
159	            if vision_result:
160	                llm_result = self._merge_vision_into(llm_result, vision_result)
161	            if is_quality_result(llm_result):
162	                return llm_result
163	
164	        if vision_result:
165	            return vision_result
166	
167	        if ocr_text:
168	            rule_result = self._finalize_fields(
169	                self._extract_from_text(ocr_text),
170	                source_text=ocr_text,
171	                extraction_method="ocr+rule",
172	                source_type=source_type,
173	                model=RULE_BASED_MODEL,
174	            )
175	            rule_result["raw_content"] = ocr_text[:5000]
176	            return rule_result
177	
178	        return {"error": "empty content", "company_name": "Unknown", "source_type": source_type}
179	
180	    async def _analyze_text(
181	        self,
182	        text: str,
183	        extraction_method: str,
184	        source_type: str,
185	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
186	        if await self._can_use_llm():
187	            try:
188	                llm_raw, model = await self._extract_with_llm(text)
189	                if llm_raw:
190	                    return self._finalize_fields(
191	                        llm_raw,
192	                        source_text=text,
193	                        extraction_method=f"{extraction_method}+llm",
194	                        source_type=source_type,
195	                        model=model,
196	                        raw_content=text[:5000],
197	                    )
198	                if model:
199	                    logger.warning(
200	                        "JOB_ANALYSIS LLM returned unparseable JSON (model=%s, source=%s)",
201	                        model,
202	                        source_type,
203	                    )
204	            except Exception as exc:
205	                logger.warning("JOB_ANALYSIS LLM failed, using rule fallback: %s", exc)
206	        else:
207	            logger.info(
208	                "JOB_ANALYSIS LLM unavailable: routes=%s credentials=%s",
209	                await llm_service.has_routes("JOB_ANALYSIS"),
210	                bool(settings.openai_api_key or settings.internal_api_token),
211	            )
212	
213	        rule_result = self._finalize_fields(
214	            self._extract_from_text(text),
215	            source_text=text,
216	            extraction_method=f"{extraction_method}+rule",
217	            source_type=source_type,
218	            model=RULE_BASED_MODEL,
219	            raw_content=text[:5000],
220	        )
221	        return rule_result
222	
223	    async def _can_use_llm(self) -> bool:
224	        return bool(settings.openai_api_key or settings.internal_api_token) and await llm_service.has_routes("JOB_ANALYSIS")
225	
226	    async def _vision_extract(
227	        self,
228	        file_base64: str,
229	        mime_type: str | None,
230	    ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any] | None, str | None]:
231	        mime = mime_type if mime_type and mime_type.startswith("image/") else "image/png"
232	        data_url = f"data:{mime};base64,{file_base64}"
233	        parsed, model = await llm_service.complete_with_image_json_for_operation(
234	            "JOB_ANALYSIS",
235	            JOB_EXTRACTION_SYSTEM,
236	            VISION_USER_PROMPT,
237	            data_url,
238	        )
239	        if not parsed:
240	            return None, model
241	        return self._fields_from_llm(parsed), model
242	
243	    async def _extract_with_llm(self, text: str) -> tuple[dict[str, Any] | None, str | None]:
244	        system = JOB_EXTRACTION_SYSTEM
245	        user_prompt = (
246	            "Analyze the following job posting text. "
247	            "If it contains OCR noise or broken words, correct them before extraction.\n\n"
248	            f"{text[:6000]}"
249	        )
250	        try:
251	            prompt = await prompt_client.render("JOB_ANALYSIS", {"content": text[:6000]})
252	            system = prompt["system_prompt"]
253	            user_prompt = prompt["user_prompt"]
254	        except Exception as exc:
255	            logger.warning("JOB_ANALYSIS prompt render failed, using built-in: %s", exc)
256	
257	        parsed, model = await llm_service.complete_json_for_operation("JOB_ANALYSIS", system, user_prompt)
258	        if not parsed:
259	            return None, model
260	        return self._fields_from_llm(parsed), model
261	
262	    _MERGE_LIST_FIELDS = (
263	        "qualifications", "required_skills", "preferred_skills",
264	        "job_responsibilities", "tech_keywords", "solution_keywords",
265	        "core_competencies", "talent_profile", "core_values",
266	    )
267	    _MERGE_SCALAR_FIELDS = ("position", "job_description", "org_culture", "title")
268	
269	    def _merge_vision_into(self, base: dict[str, Any], vision: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
270	        """OCR+LLM 결과(base)의 빈 필드만 Vision 결과로 보완한다. 채워진 필드는 유지."""
271	        merged = dict(base)
272	        for key in self._MERGE_LIST_FIELDS:
273	            if not merged.get(key) and vision.get(key):
274	                merged[key] = vision[key]
275	        for key in self._MERGE_SCALAR_FIELDS:
276	            if not merged.get(key) and vision.get(key):
277	                merged[key] = vision[key]
278	        base_company = str(merged.get("company_name") or "").strip()
279	        vision_company = str(vision.get("company_name") or "").strip()
280	        if (not base_company or base_company == "Unknown") and vision_company and vision_company != "Unknown":
281	            merged["company_name"] = vision_company
282	        merged["extraction_method"] = f"{base.get('extraction_method', 'ocr+llm')}+vision-merge"
283	        return merged
284	
285	    def _finalize_fields(
286	        self,
287	        data: dict[str, Any],
288	        *,
289	        source_text: str,
290	        extraction_method: str,
291	        source_type: str,
292	        model: str | None = None,
293	        raw_content: str | None = None,
294	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
295	        result = postprocess_extraction(data, raw_content or source_text)
296	        result["source_type"] = source_type
297	        result["extraction_method"] = extraction_method
298	        if model:
299	            result["model"] = model
300	        result["raw_content"] = raw_content or source_text[:5000]
301	        return result
302	
303	    def _fields_from_llm(self, parsed: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
304	        company = str(parsed.get("company_name") or "Unknown").strip() or "Unknown"
305	        position = parsed.get("position")
306	        position_str = str(position).strip() if position else None
307	        description = str(parsed.get("job_description") or "").strip()
308	        culture = parsed.get("org_culture")
309	
310	        return {
311	            "company_name": company,
312	            "position": position_str,
313	            "title": f"{company} {position_str}".strip() if company != "Unknown" or position_str else None,
314	            "qualifications": self._coerce_string_list(parsed.get("qualifications")),
315	            "required_skills": self._coerce_string_list(parsed.get("required_skills")),
316	            "preferred_skills": self._coerce_string_list(parsed.get("preferred_skills")),
317	            "job_responsibilities": self._coerce_string_list(parsed.get("job_responsibilities")),
318	            "tech_keywords": self._coerce_string_list(parsed.get("tech_keywords")),
319	            "talent_profile": self._coerce_string_list(parsed.get("talent_profile")),
320	            "core_competencies": self._coerce_string_list(parsed.get("core_competencies")),
321	            "core_values": self._coerce_string_list(parsed.get("talent_profile"))[:3],
322	            "job_description": description[:2000] if description else None,
323	            "org_culture": str(culture).strip() if culture else None,
324	            "fit_score": None,
325	        }
326	
327	    def _extract_from_text(self, text: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
328	        company = self._extract_company(text)
329	        position = self._extract_position(text)
330	        required, preferred = self._extract_skills(text)
331	        qualifications, required = self._split_qualifications(required)
332	        responsibilities = self._extract_responsibilities(text)
333	        tech_keywords = self._extract_tech_keywords(text)
334	        talent = self._extract_talent_profile(text)
335	        competencies = self._extract_competencies(text)
336	        culture = self._extract_culture(text)
337	
338	        return {
339	            "company_name": company,
340	            "position": position,
341	            "title": f"{company} {position}".strip() if company or position else None,
342	            "qualifications": qualifications,
343	            "required_skills": required,
344	            "preferred_skills": preferred,
345	            "job_responsibilities": responsibilities,
346	            "tech_keywords": tech_keywords,
347	            "talent_profile": talent,
348	            "core_competencies": competencies,
349	            "core_values": talent[:3],
350	            "job_description": text[:2000],
351	            "org_culture": culture,
352	            "fit_score": None,
353	        }
354	
355	    def _split_qualifications(self, items: list[str]) -> tuple[list[str], list[str]]:
356	        qualifications: list[str] = []
357	        skills: list[str] = []
358	        for item in items:
359	            if re.search(r"(4년제|대학|졸업|학사|석사|박사|전문학사)", item) and "경험" not in item:
360	                qualifications.append(item)
361	            else:
362	                skills.append(item)
363	        return dedupe_list(qualifications), dedupe_list(skills)
364	
365	    def _extract_pdf_base64(self, file_base64: str) -> str | None:
366	        try:
367	            from pypdf import PdfReader
368	            data = base64.b64decode(file_base64)
369	            reader = PdfReader(io.BytesIO(data))
370	            pages = [page.extract_text() or "" for page in reader.pages]
371	            return "\n".join(pages).strip()
372	        except Exception as exc:
373	            logger.warning("PDF text extraction failed: %s", exc)
374	            return None
375	
376	    def _extract_image_text(self, file_base64: str) -> str | None:
377	        try:
378	            from PIL import Image, ImageEnhance, ImageOps
379	            import pytesseract
380	
381	            data = base64.b64decode(file_base64)
382	            image = Image.open(io.BytesIO(data))
383	            image = ImageOps.exif_transpose(image)
384	            image = image.convert("RGB")
385	
386	            width, height = image.size
387	            if max(width, height) < 1200:
388	                scale = 1200 / max(width, height)
389	                image = image.resize(
390	                    (int(width * scale), int(height * scale)),
391	                    Image.Resampling.LANCZOS,
392	                )
393	
394	            image = ImageEnhance.Contrast(image).enhance(1.4)
395	            image = ImageEnhance.Sharpness(image).enhance(1.2)
396	
397	            configs = ["--psm 3 --oem 3", "--psm 6 --oem 3", "--psm 11 --oem 3"]
398	            best = ""
399	            for config in configs:
400	                candidate = pytesseract.image_to_string(image, lang="kor+eng", config=config)
401	                if len(candidate.strip()) > len(best.strip()):
402	                    best = candidate
403	
404	            return best.strip() if best.strip() else None
405	        except Exception as exc:
406	            logger.warning("OCR failed (tesseract may be missing): %s", exc)
407	            return None
408	
409	    def _coerce_string_list(self, value: Any) -> list[str]:
410	        if not isinstance(value, list):
411	            return []
412	        return [str(item).strip() for item in value if item and str(item).strip()]
413	
414	    async def _fetch_url(self, url: str) -> str | None:
415	        try:
416	            async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=15.0, follow_redirects=True) as client:
417	                response = await client.get(url, headers={"User-Agent": "ResumePilot/1.0"})
418	                if response.status_code == 200:
419	                    return self._html_to_text(response.text)
420	        except Exception as exc:
421	            logger.warning("URL fetch failed: %s", exc)
422	            return None
423	        return None
424	
425	    def _html_to_text(self, html_content: str) -> str:
426	        text = html_content
427	        text = re.sub(r"<(script|style|noscript)[^>]*>[\s\S]*?</\1>", "\n", text, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
428	        text = re.sub(r"<(br|hr)\s*/?>", "\n", text, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
429	        text = re.sub(r"</(p|div|li|h[1-6]|tr|td|th|section|article|header|footer)>", "\n", text, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
430	        text = re.sub(r"<[^>]+>", " ", text)
431	        return self._normalize_text(text)
432	
433	    def _normalize_text(self, text: str) -> str:
434	        decoded = text
435	        for _ in range(3):
436	            next_decoded = html.unescape(decoded)
437	            if next_decoded == decoded:
438	                break
439	            decoded = next_decoded
440	        decoded = decoded.replace("\u200b", "").replace("\ufeff", "")
441	        lines = [re.sub(r"\s+", " ", line).strip() for line in decoded.splitlines()]
442	        return "\n".join(line for line in lines if line).strip()
443	
444	    def _extract_company(self, text: str) -> str:
445	        for pattern in COMPANY_PATTERNS:
446	            match = re.search(pattern, text, re.IGNORECASE)
447	            if match:
448	                candidate = match.group(1).strip()
449	                if not has_ocr_garbage(candidate):
450	                    return candidate
451	        first_line = text.split("\n")[0].strip()
452	        if len(first_line) <= 30 and not has_ocr_garbage(first_line):
453	            return first_line
454	        return "Unknown"
455	
456	    def _extract_position(self, text: str) -> str | None:
457	        for pattern in POSITION_PATTERNS:
458	            match = re.search(pattern, text, re.IGNORECASE)
459	            if match:
460	                return match.group(1).strip()[:100]
461	        return None
462	
463	    def _extract_skills(self, text: str) -> tuple[list[str], list[str]]:
464	        required: list[str] = []
465	        preferred: list[str] = []
466	        for i, pattern in enumerate(SKILL_SECTION_PATTERNS):
467	            match = re.search(pattern, text, re.IGNORECASE)
468	            if not match:
469	                continue
470	            items = self._split_bullet_items(match.group(1))
471	            if i in {0, 2, 3}:
472	                required.extend(items)
473	            elif i == 1:
474	                preferred.extend(items)
475	        return dedupe_list(required)[:15], dedupe_list(preferred)[:15]
476	
477	    def _extract_responsibilities(self, text: str) -> list[str]:
478	        for pattern in RESPONSIBILITY_SECTION_PATTERNS:
479	            match = re.search(pattern, text, re.IGNORECASE)
480	            if match:
481	                return self._split_bullet_items(match.group(1))[:12]
482	        return []
483	
484	    def _split_bullet_items(self, section: str) -> list[str]:
485	        section = section.replace("\u200b", "").replace("\ufeff", "")
486	        cleaned: list[str] = []
487	        for line in section.splitlines():
488	            normalized = re.sub(r"^[\s\-\*•·]+", "", line.strip())
489	            normalized = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", normalized)
490	            if normalized and len(normalized) > 1:
491	                cleaned.append(normalized)
492	        if cleaned:
493	            return cleaned[:15]
494	        items = re.split(r"[\n•·]+", section)
495	        return [i.strip() for i in items if i.strip() and len(i.strip()) > 1][:15]
496	
497	    def _extract_tech_keywords(self, text: str) -> list[str]:
498	        lower = text.lower()
499	        found = [kw for kw in TECH_KEYWORDS if kw in lower]
500	        return dedupe_list(found)[:20]
501

504	        patterns = [

506	            r"(책임감|주인의식|협업|커뮤니케이션|도전|창의|열정|성장|리더십|문제\s*해결)",
507	        ]
508	        for pattern in patterns:
509	            for match in re.finditer(pattern, text, re.IGNORECASE):
510	                val = match.group(1).strip() if match.lastindex else match.group(0).strip()
511	                if val and val not in keywords:
512	                    keywords.append(val[:50])
513	        return keywords[:10]
```

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-13 12:06:41Z)**_

로그의 `OCR failed (tesseract missing)`은 예상된 경고이고, 진짜 문제는 그 다음입니다. `job_analysis_service.py`(job_analysis_service.py:139-178) 흐름을 보면:

1. Vision 시도 → 실패 시
2. OCR 시도 → tesseract 없어서 실패 (`ocr_text` 없음)
3. 둘 다 없으면 `{"error": "empty content", "company_name": "Unknown"}` 반환

즉 지금 결과는 **Vision도 실패했다**는 뜻입니다. Vision을 쓰려면 `_can_use_llm()`(job_analysis_service.py:223)이 참이어야 하는데, 이건 `INTERNAL_API_TOKEN` 존재 여부와 **prompt-service가 `JOB_ANALYSIS` 라우트를 갖고 있는지**(DB 조회)에 달려 있습니다.

방금 DB를 윈도우 로컬 → 우분투 원격으로 바꾸셨죠 — 우분투 DB에는 `JOB_ANALYSIS` 관련 LLM 라우트 설정이 없거나 다를 수 있습니다. 이게 원인일 가능성이 높습니다.

Cursor 터미널에서 AI Gateway(8000) 로그에 다음 줄이 있는지 확인해 주시겠어요?
```
JOB_ANALYSIS LLM unavailable: routes=... credentials=...
```
이 줄이 있으면 우분표 DB 쪽 라우트 설정 문제인 게 확정됩니다.

`resume-ai`가 라우트 정보를 resume-api의 `/api/v1/internal/llm/runtime-config`에서 가져오는데, 이때 DB에 저장된 API 키가 `LlmSecretsCipher.java`로 **`LLM_ENCRYPTION_KEY`를 이용해 복호화**됩니다.

같은 우분투 DB를 보고 있으니 라우트 데이터 자체는 동일한데, 로컬 `.env.local`의 `LLM_ENCRYPTION_KEY`가 **우분투 서버 `.env`의 `LLM_ENCRYPTION_KEY`와 다르면** 복호화가 실패(또는 깨진 값)해서 라우트가 없는 것처럼 처리되고, 결국 Unknown으로 떨어집니다.

확인해 주세요:

```bash
# 우분투 서버에서
grep LLM_ENCRYPTION_KEY ~/apps/resume-pilot/.env
```

이 값이 로컬 `.env.local`의 `LLM_ENCRYPTION_KEY`(`a2ab7cb13c1a4c58e357b67c35bf1e100d78c951a11da9e8`)와 **정확히 일치하는지** 봐주세요. 다르면 로컬 `.env.local` 값을 우분투 값으로 맞춰주시면 됩니다 (값은 여기 채팅에 붙여넣지 마시고 직접 비교/수정해 주세요 — 비밀값이라).

먼저 중요한 문제부터: 방금 제 명령 결과에 실제 API 키들(Gemini, OpenAI, GitHub PAT 등)이 그대로 노출됐습니다. 이건 제 실수입니다 — 값을 다시 인용하지 않을게요. **`github_pat_...` 토큰은 노출된 즉시 폐기(revoke)하고 재발급하시는 걸 권장합니다.**

본론: 직접 테스트해보니 `JOB_ANALYSIS` 라우트가 정상적으로 로드되고 API 키 복호화도 잘 됩니다 — 즉 지금 이 순간엔 백엔드 설정에 문제가 없습니다.

아까 "Unknown" 이 나온 건 그 이전 단계(DB URL 오타/따옴표 오류, MapStruct 컴파일 오류 등)를 고치기 **전**의 시도였을 가능성이 높습니다. 지금은 다 정상화된 상태이니, `resume-ai` 터미널을 한번 재시작(Ctrl+C 후 다시 uvicorn 실행)하고 `localhost:5173/job-postings`에서 다시 시도해 보세요.

```text
284	            <h3 className="font-medium">{t('workspace.keywordCompare')}</h3>
285	            <p><span className="text-muted-foreground">{t('workspace.matched')}:</span> {((keywords.matched as string[]) || []).join(', ') || t('common.none')}</p>
286	            <p className="text-destructive"><span className="text-muted-foreground">{t('workspace.missing')}:</span> {((keywords.missing as string[]) || []).join(', ') || t('common.none')}</p>
287	          </section>
288	        )}
289	
290	        {detections.length > 0 && (
291	          <section className="space-y-2">
292	            <h3 className="text-sm font-medium">{t('workspace.aiDetection')}</h3>
293	            {detections.map((d, i) => (
294	              <div key={i} className="rounded-md border p-2 text-sm">
295	                <StatusChip label={d.level} variant={LEVEL_VARIANT[d.level] ?? 'default'} className="mb-1" />
296	                <p>{d.sentence}</p>
297	                <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">{d.reason}</p>
298	              </div>
299	            ))}
300	          </section>
301	        )}
302	
303	        {reviews.length > 0 && (
304	          <section className="space-y-2">
305	            <h3 className="text-sm font-medium">{t('workspace.review')}</h3>
306	            {reviews.map((r) => (
307	              <div key={r.paragraph_index} className="rounded-md border p-3 text-sm space-y-1">
308	                <p><strong>{t('workspace.strengths')}:</strong> {r.strengths.join(', ')}</p>
309	                <p><strong>{t('workspace.weaknesses')}:</strong> {r.weaknesses.join(', ')}</p>
310	                <p className="text-primary">{r.improvement}</p>
311	              </div>
312	            ))}
313	          </section>
314	        )}
315	
316	        {interview.length > 0 && (
317	          <section className="space-y-2">
318	            <h3 className="text-sm font-medium">{t('workspace.interview')}</h3>
319	            {interview.map((q, i) => (
320	              <div key={i} className="rounded-md bg-muted/50 p-3">
321	                <Badge variant="outline" className="mb-1">{q.category}</Badge>
322	                <p className="text-sm">{q.question}</p>
323	              </div>
324	            ))}
325	          </section>
326	        )}
327	
328	        {!result && recommended.length === 0 && (
329	          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">{t('jobPostings.selectOrUpload')}</p>
330	        )}
331	      </div>
332	    </ScrollArea>
333	  );
334	
335	  return (
336	    <div className="space-y-4" data-testid="workspace-page">
337	      <div className="px-0 xl:hidden">
338	        <PageHeader title={t('workspace.title')} />
339	      </div>
340	      <WorkspaceLayout left={setupPanel} center={editorPanel} right={resultsPanel} />
341	    </div>
342	  );
343	}
344
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-13 12:20:50Z)**_

`/workspace` 페이지 사용법은 이렇습니다.

**왼쪽 패널 (설정)**
1. 저장된 공고 목록에서 선택하거나, 공고 텍스트를 직접 붙여넣기(`jobText`)
2. "추천" 버튼 → 경험 라이브러리에서 관련 경험 추천
3. 첨삭 강도 슬라이더 (0~100%, 20 단위)

**가운데 패널 (에디터)**
- "생성" 버튼 → 자소서 초안 생성 (`/generate/resume`) → 이어서 자동으로 면접 예상질문·키워드 비교까지 호출

**오른쪽 패널 (결과)**
- 추천 경험, 품질 점수, 키워드 매칭/누락, AI 흔적 탐지 결과, 문단별 첨삭 리뷰, 면접 질문이 표시됨

그리고 질문하신 "기업정보(기업공고)"는 — 왼쪽 패널의 "저장된 공고" 드롭다운이 바로 그겁니다. `/job-postings` 페이지에서 먼저 공고를 분석·저장해두면 여기서 선택할 수 있어요. 즉 워크플로우는 `job-postings`에서 공고 분석 → `workspace`에서 그 공고 선택 후 생성, 순서입니다.

좋은 소식은 이건 버그가 아니라 API가 정상 응답한 겁니다 — `{"success":true,"data":[]}`, 즉 **추천된 경험이 0개**라서 화면에 아무것도 안 뜬 거예요 (UI가 빈 배열일 때 아무 표시도 안 하는 건 맞지만, 최소한 "결과 없음" 안내가 없는 건 UX 개선 여지가 있네요).

진짜 원인은 **경험 라이브러리가 비어있거나, 저장된 경험에 임베딩이 안 되어 있는 것**일 가능성이 높습니다. rag-service는 pgvector로 유사도 검색을 하는데 검색 대상 자체가 없으면 무조건 빈 배열이 옵니다.

확인해 주시겠어요?
1. `/experiences` (경험 라이브러리) 페이지에 저장된 경험이 있는지
2. 있다면 각 경험이 "저장" 시 임베딩 처리(rag-service `/api/v1/rag/recommend-experiences` 대상 데이터)까지 됐는지

경험이 하나도 없다면, 먼저 경험을 1~2개 등록하신 후 다시 "추천" 버튼을 눌러보시면 됩니다.

```text
32	        return experienceQueryRepository.findByUserIdWithOptionalType(userId, type).stream()
33	                .map(experienceMapper::toResponse)
34	                .toList();
35	    }
36	
37	    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
38	    public ExperienceResponse get(UUID userId, UUID id) {
39	        return experienceMapper.toResponse(getOwned(userId, id));
40	    }
41	
42	    @Transactional
43	    public ExperienceResponse create(UUID userId, ExperienceCreateRequest request) {
44	        Experience experience = mapCreate(userId, request);
45	        experienceRepository.save(experience);
46	        ragService.embedExperience(userId, experience);
47	        return experienceMapper.toResponse(experience);
48	    }
49	
50	    @Transactional
51	    public ExperienceResponse update(UUID userId, UUID id, ExperienceUpdateRequest request) {
52	        Experience experience = getOwned(userId, id);
53	        applyUpdate(experience, request);
54	        ragService.embedExperience(userId, experience);
55	        return experienceMapper.toResponse(experience);
56	    }
57	
58	    @Transactional
59	    public void delete(UUID userId, UUID id) {
60	        experienceRepository.delete(getOwned(userId, id));
61	    }
62	
63	    @Transactional
64	    public void embed(UUID userId, UUID id) {
65	        ragService.embedExperience(userId, getOwned(userId, id));
66	    }
67	
68	    private Experience getOwned(UUID userId, UUID id) {
69	        Experience experience = experienceRepository.findById(id)
70	                .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(ErrorCode.NOT_FOUND));
71	        if (!experience.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
72	            throw new BusinessException(ErrorCode.FORBIDDEN);
73	        }
74	        return experience;
75	    }
76	
77	    private Experience mapCreate(UUID userId, ExperienceCreateRequest req) {
78	        return Experience.builder()
79	                .userId(userId)
80	                .type(req.type())
81	                .title(req.title())
82	                .description(req.description())
83	                .role(req.role())
84	                .contribution(req.contribution())
85	                .result(req.result())
86	                .numericResult(req.numericResult())
87	                .starSituation(req.starSituation())
88	                .starTask(req.starTask())
89	                .starAction(req.starAction())
90	                .starResult(req.starResult())
91	                .skills(req.skills() != null ? req.skills() : List.of())
92	                .startDate(req.startDate())
93	                .endDate(req.endDate())
94	                .build();
95	    }
96	
97	    private void applyUpdate(Experience e, ExperienceUpdateRequest req) {
98	        if (req.type() != null) e.setType(req.type());
99	        if (req.title() != null) e.setTitle(req.title());
100	        if (req.description() != null) e.setDescription(req.description());
101	        if (req.role() != null) e.setRole(req.role());
102	        if (req.contribution() != null) e.setContribution(req.contribution());
103	        if (req.result() != null) e.setResult(req.result());
104	        if (req.numericResult() != null) e.setNumericResult(req.numericResult());
105	        if (req.starSituation() != null) e.setStarSituation(req.starSituation());
106	        if (req.starTask() != null) e.setStarTask(req.starTask());
107	        if (req.starAction() != null) e.setStarAction(req.starAction());
108	        if (req.starResult() != null) e.setStarResult(req.starResult());
109	        if (req.skills() != null) e.setSkills(req.skills());
110	        if (req.startDate() != null) e.setStartDate(req.startDate());
111	        if (req.endDate() != null) e.setEndDate(req.endDate());
112	    }
113	}
114
```

```text
53	  );

114	          }

118	          ) : (
```

```text
32	export interface CareerPortfolio {

42	  position: '',

46	});

49	  school: '',

61	});

64	  jobExperience: '',

66	  growthValues: '',
67	  personality: '',
68	  motivation: '',
69	});
70	
71	export const emptyCareerPortfolio = (): CareerPortfolio => ({
72	  careers: [],
73	  educations: [],
74	  skills: [],
75	  careerStatement: '',
76	  coverLetter: emptyCoverLetter(),
77	});
78	
79	export function normalizeCareerPortfolio(raw?: Partial<CareerPortfolio> | null): CareerPortfolio {
80	  if (!raw) return emptyCareerPortfolio();
81	  return {
82	    careers: raw.careers?.length ? raw.careers : [],
83	    educations: raw.educations?.length ? raw.educations : [],
84	    skills: raw.skills?.length ? raw.skills : [],
85	    careerStatement: raw.careerStatement ?? '',
86	    coverLetter: { ...emptyCoverLetter(), ...raw.coverLetter },
87	  };
88	}
89	
90	export function portfolioCompletion(p: CareerPortfolio): number {
91	  let filled = 0;
92	  const total = 9;
93	  if (p.careers.some((c) => c.company || c.position)) filled++;
94	  if (p.educations.some((e) => e.school)) filled++;
95	  if (p.skills.some((s) => s.name)) filled++;
96	  if (p.careerStatement?.trim()) filled++;
97	  const cl = p.coverLetter;
98	  if (cl.jobExperience?.trim()) filled++;
99	  if (cl.collaboration?.trim()) filled++;
100	  if (cl.growthValues?.trim()) filled++;
101	  if (cl.personality?.trim()) filled++;
102	  if (cl.motivation?.trim()) filled++;
103	  return Math.round((filled / total) * 100);
104	}
105	
106	export const SKILL_LEVELS = ['beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced', 'expert'] as const;
107
```

```text
78	              <EmptyHint text={t('portfolio.emptyEducations')} />
79	            ) : (

81	                {portfolio.educations.map((e, i) => (

85	                  </li>
86	                ))}
87	              </ul>
88	            )}
89	          </CardContent>
90	        </Card>
91	
92	        <Card size="sm">
93	          <CardHeader>
94	            <CardTitle className="text-primary text-sm">{t('portfolio.skills')}</CardTitle>
95	          </CardHeader>
96	          <CardContent>
97	            {portfolio.skills.length === 0 ? (
98	              <EmptyHint text={t('portfolio.emptySkills')} />
99	            ) : (
100	              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
101	                {portfolio.skills.map((s, i) => (
102	                  <Badge key={i} variant="secondary">{s.name}</Badge>
103	                ))}
104	              </div>
105	            )}
106	          </CardContent>
107	        </Card>
108	
109	        <Card className="md:col-span-2 lg:col-span-3" size="sm">
110	          <CardHeader>
111	            <CardTitle className="text-primary text-sm">{t('portfolio.careerStatement')}</CardTitle>
112	          </CardHeader>
113	          <CardContent>
114	            {portfolio.careerStatement?.trim() ? (
115	              <p className="line-clamp-6 whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm leading-relaxed text-muted-foreground">
116	                {portfolio.careerStatement}
117	              </p>
118	            ) : (
119	              <EmptyHint text={t('portfolio.emptyStatement')} />
120	            )}
121	          </CardContent>
122	        </Card>
123	      </div>
124	
125	      <div className="grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-2">
126	        <CoverCard title={`5-1 · ${t('portfolio.section51')}`} text={cl.jobExperience} />
127	        <CoverCard title={`5-2 · ${t('portfolio.section52')}`} text={cl.collaboration} />

130	        <CoverCard title={`5-5 · ${t('portfolio.section55')}`} text={cl.motivation} className="md:col-span-2" />
131	      </div>
132	    </div>
133	  );
134	}
135	
136	function EmptyHint({ text }: { text: string }) {
137	  return <p className="text-sm italic text-muted-foreground">{text}</p>;
138	}
139	
140	function CoverCard({ title, text, className = '' }: { title: string; text?: string; className?: string }) {
141	  return (
142	    <Card size="sm" className={className}>
143	      <CardHeader>
144	        <CardTitle className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{title}</CardTitle>
145	      </CardHeader>
146	      <CardContent>
147	        <p className="line-clamp-4 whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm text-muted-foreground">{text?.trim() || '—'}</p>
148	      </CardContent>
149	    </Card>
150	  );
151	}
152
```

```text
33	export default function ExperiencesPage() {

39	  const [form, setForm] = useState({ type: 'PROJECT', title: '', description: '', role: '', result: '' });
40	
41	  const { data: experiences = [], isLoading } = useQuery({ queryKey: ['experiences'], queryFn: () => api.listExperiences() });
42	
43	  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
44	    const q = search.trim().toLowerCase();
45	    return experiences.filter((exp) => {
46	      if (typeFilter !== 'ALL' && exp.type !== typeFilter) return false;
47	      if (!q) return true;
48	      return (
49	        exp.title.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
50	        (exp.description?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ?? false) ||
51	        (exp.role?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ?? false) ||
52	        t(`experienceType.${exp.type}`, { defaultValue: exp.type }).toLowerCase().includes(q)
53	      );
54	    });
55	  }, [experiences, search, typeFilter, t]);
56	
57	  const comparators = useMemo(
58	    () => ({
59	      type: (a: (typeof experiences)[0], b: (typeof experiences)[0]) => a.type.localeCompare(b.type),
60	      title: (a: (typeof experiences)[0], b: (typeof experiences)[0]) => a.title.localeCompare(b.title),
61	      role: (a: (typeof experiences)[0], b: (typeof experiences)[0]) => (a.role ?? '').localeCompare(b.role ?? ''),
62	    }),
63	    [],
64	  );
65	
66	  const { sorted, sortKey, direction, toggleSort } = useUrlSort(filtered, comparators, 'title');
67	  const { page, setPage, totalPages, paginated, from, to, total } = useUrlPagination(sorted, 10);
68	
69	  const createMutation = useMutation({

71	    onSuccess: () => {
72	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['experiences'] });
73	      setShowForm(false);
74	      setForm({ type: 'PROJECT', title: '', description: '', role: '', result: '' });
75	      toast.success(t('common.saved'));
76	    },
77	    onError: () => toast.error(t('common.error')),
78	  });
79	
80	  const deleteMutation = useMutation({
81	    mutationFn: api.deleteExperience,
82	    onSuccess: () => {
83	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['experiences'] });
84	      toast.success(t('common.deleted'));
85	    },
86	    onError: () => toast.error(t('common.error')),
87	  });
88	
89	  return (
90	    <PageShell size="lg">
91	      <PageHeader
92	        title={t('experiences.title')}
93	        action={
94	          <Button variant={showForm ? 'outline' : 'default'} data-testid="experience-add-btn" onClick={() => setShowForm(!showForm)}>
95	            {showForm ? t('common.cancel') : t('experiences.add')}
96	          </Button>
97	        }
98	      />
99	
100	      {showForm && (
101	        <Card>
102	          <CardHeader>
103	            <CardTitle>{t('experiences.add')}</CardTitle>
104	          </CardHeader>
105	          <form
106	            onSubmit={(e) => {
107	              e.preventDefault();
108	              createMutation.mutate(form);
109	            }}
110	          >
111	            <CardContent className="space-y-4">
112	              <div className="space-y-2">
113	                <Label>{t('experiences.typeLabel')}</Label>
114	                <Select value={form.type} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, type: v })}>
115	                  <SelectTrigger>
116	                    <SelectValue />
117	                  </SelectTrigger>
118	                  <SelectContent>
119	                    {EXPERIENCE_TYPES.map((type) => (

121	                        {t(`experienceType.${type}`)}
122	                      </SelectItem>
123	                    ))}
124	                  </SelectContent>
125	                </Select>
126	              </div>

129	                <Input data-testid="experience-title-input" value={form.title} onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, title: e.target.value })} required />
130	              </div>
```

 `E:\workspace\resume-pilot\resume-api\src\main\java\com\resumepilot\application\rag\RagService.java`

```text
1	package com.resumepilot.application.rag;
2	
3	import com.resumepilot.domain.experience.Experience;
4	import com.resumepilot.domain.experience.ExperienceRepository;
5	import com.resumepilot.infrastructure.ai.RagServiceClient;
6	import com.resumepilot.presentation.dto.rag.ExperienceRecommendResponse;
7	import com.resumepilot.presentation.dto.rag.RagSearchRequest;
8	import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
9	import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
10	import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
11	
12	import java.util.*;
13	
14	@Service
15	@RequiredArgsConstructor
16	public class RagService {
17	
18	    private final RagServiceClient ragServiceClient;
19	    private final ExperienceRepository experienceRepository;
20	
21	    public List<Map<String, Object>> search(UUID userId, RagSearchRequest request) {
22	        return ragServiceClient.search(userId, request.query(), request.entityTypes(), request.topK());
23	    }
24	
25	    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
26	    public List<ExperienceRecommendResponse> recommendExperiences(UUID userId, List<String> keywords, int topK) {
27	        String query = String.join(" ", keywords);
28	        List<Map<String, Object>> results = ragServiceClient.search(
29	                userId, query, List.of("EXPERIENCE"), topK);
30	
31	        List<ExperienceRecommendResponse> recommendations = new ArrayList<>();
32	        for (Map<String, Object> r : results) {
33	            UUID expId = UUID.fromString(String.valueOf(r.get("entity_id")));
34	            experienceRepository.findById(expId).ifPresent(exp -> {
35	                double score = r.get("score") instanceof Number n ? n.doubleValue() : 0;
36	                recommendations.add(new ExperienceRecommendResponse(
37	                        exp.getId(), exp.getTitle(), exp.getType().name(),
38	                        exp.getDescription(), exp.getResult(), score
39	                ));
40	            });
41	        }
42	        return recommendations;
43	    }
44	
45	    public void embedExperience(UUID userId, Experience exp) {
46	        String text = String.join("\n",
47	                exp.getTitle(),
48	                Optional.ofNullable(exp.getDescription()).orElse(""),
49	                Optional.ofNullable(exp.getRole()).orElse(""),
50	                Optional.ofNullable(exp.getResult()).orElse(""),
51	                Optional.ofNullable(exp.getStarAction()).orElse("")
52	        );
53	        ragServiceClient.createEmbedding(userId, "EXPERIENCE", exp.getId(), text);
54	    }
55	
56	    public void embedResume(UUID userId, UUID versionId, String content) {
57	        ragServiceClient.createEmbedding(userId, "RESUME", versionId, content);
58	    }
59	}
60
```

## 1. Backend structure

- **Enum**: `resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/domain/experience/ExperienceType.java:3-6` — 11 values: `PROJECT, ACHIEVEMENT, CAREER, EDUCATION, CERTIFICATION, COLLABORATION, CONFLICT_RESOLUTION, PROBLEM_SOLVING, LEADERSHIP, TECHNOLOGY, OTHER`
- **Entity**: `resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/domain/experience/Experience.java` — table `experiences`, fields: `id, userId, type(enum string), title, description, role, contribution, result, numericResult, starSituation, starTask, starAction, starResult, skills(JSON list), metadata(JSON map), startDate, endDate, createdAt, updatedAt`
- **Repository**: `resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/domain/experience/ExperienceRepository.java` (JPA) + `resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/infrastructure/persistence/ExperienceQueryRepository.java` (QueryDSL, `findByUserIdWithOptionalType`)
- **Service**: `resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/application/experience/ExperienceService.java` — `list/get/create/update/delete/embed`, calls `RagService.embedExperience` on create/update
- **Controller**: `resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/presentation/controller/ExperienceController.java` — `/api/v1/experiences` (GET list w/ optional `type` filter, GET by id, POST, PATCH, DELETE, POST `/{id}/embed`)
- **DTOs**: `presentation/dto/experience/ExperienceCreateRequest.java`, `ExperienceUpdateRequest.java`, `ExperienceResponse.java` — all share the same flat generic-experience field set (title, description, role, contribution, result, numericResult, star*, skills, startDate, endDate); no type-specific fields.
- **Migration**: `resume-api/src/main/resources/db/migration/V4__experience_library.sql:1-21` creates `experiences` table with exactly the columns above. **Note**: V4 also creates `projects`, `careers`, `achievements` side tables (lines 23-49) intended as type-specific detail tables (careers: company/department/position; achievements: metric), but **these tables are unused dead schema** — no Java entity/repository maps to them (confirmed via grep across `resume-api/src/main/java`, only hits are unrelated `CareerPortfolio`/`CareerItem` classes). Safe to ignore or drop separately.

## 2. Type-specific fields today

None. All 11 `ExperienceType` values share one generic schema (title/description/role/contribution/result/numericResult/STAR fields/skills/dates/metadata JSON). CAREER/EDUCATION/CERTIFICATION have **no dedicated columns** currently — the `careers` side-table from V4 was never wired up. So there's no backend migration needed to "extract" special fields; you're free to design a fresh simple-entry schema for the dashboard versions.

## 3. Frontend "경험 추가" form

- Page: `resume-web/src/pages/ExperiencesPage.tsx:33-150+` — inline card form (not modal), type `<Select>` populated from `EXPERIENCE_TYPES` (all 11 values) defined at `resume-web/src/i18n/index.ts:44-47`. Labels via `t('experienceType.${type}')` in `resume-web/src/i18n/locales/{ko,en,ja,zh}.json`.
- Fields rendered: type select, title, description, role, result (generic fields only — matches backend DTO).
- API calls: `resume-web/src/lib/api.ts:220-226` — `listExperiences(type?)`, `createExperience(data)`, `updateExperience(id, data)`, `deleteExperience(id)`, all hitting `/api/v1/experiences`.

## 4. DashboardPage.tsx — existing "simple entry" example

`resume-web/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx` currently has: OnboardingGuide, `CareerPortfolioOverview` (the portfolio summary card grid), resume list table (search/sort/paginate), no experience-library table shown directly (experiences count only feeds onboarding).

**The "자격증"-like example the user meant is the Career Portfolio feature, not literally certifications yet** — it's the closest existing pattern of "simple structured fact" entries living outside the Experience library:
- Types: `resume-web/src/lib/career-portfolio.ts:1-38` — `CareerItem` (company/position/startDate/endDate/description), `EducationItem` (school/major/degree/startDate/endDate/description). **No `CertificationItem` exists yet.**
- Backend mirror: `resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/domain/user/CareerPortfolio.java:35-54` — same `CareerItem`/`EducationItem` static nested classes; stored as a single JSONB blob on `user_profiles.career_portfolio` (migration `V11__user_career_portfolio.sql:1-3`), wrapped via `CareerPortfolioDto.java`.
- Dashboard display: `resume-web/src/components/career/CareerPortfolioOverview.tsx` — read-only summary cards for careers/educations/skills/careerStatement/coverLetter, rendered on Dashboard (`DashboardPage.tsx:76`), with an "edit" link to `/settings`.
- Edit UI: `resume-web/src/components/career/CareerPortfolioEditor.tsx` (used from Settings page — not read yet in detail, but is the actual add/edit form for careers/educations/skills, list-of-cards CRUD pattern within a single JSONB field, no dedicated REST CRUD endpoints per item).

This CareerItem/EducationItem + JSONB-on-user_profiles pattern is a strong candidate to reuse/extend (e.g., add `CertificationItem` and a `certifications: []` array) rather than building three new top-level entities — it already matches "short-form dashboard entry" exactly, and one field (skills) already lives there too.

## 5. RAG/AI services — no 11-type assumption

- `resume-api` `RagService.embedExperience` (`resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/application/rag/RagService.java:45-54`) builds embedding text generically from title/description/role/result/starAction — **no branching on `type`**, no exclusion/inclusion list of ExperienceType values.
- `rag-service/app/main.py` uses `entity_type` = `"EXPERIENCE"`/`"RESUME"` (RAG entity kind, unrelated to `ExperienceType`) — grep for `ExperienceType|CAREER|EDUCATION|CERTIFICATION` in `rag-service/` and `prompt-service/` returned no matches.
- `resume-ai/app/services/job_extraction_postprocess.py` has `CAREER`/`EDUCATION` mentions but they're unrelated — Korean text-pattern heuristics for classifying **job posting** text (e.g. `EDUCATION_PATTERN` regex for "학사/석사" degree requirements, `"CAREER"` as a noise-prefix string to strip from scraped text), not the domain `ExperienceType` enum.

**Conclusion: safe to remove CAREER/EDUCATION/CERTIFICATION from `ExperienceType` without touching rag-service, prompt-service, or resume-ai.** Only resume-api (enum, DTOs already generic, ExperienceQueryRepository) and resume-web (`EXPERIENCE_TYPES` array + i18n labels + ExperiencesPage select options) need changes.

## 6. Existing reusable education/career/certification DTOs/pages

- **Reuse candidate (career+education)**: `CareerPortfolio.CareerItem` / `CareerPortfolio.EducationItem` in `resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/domain/user/CareerPortfolio.java` + matching TS types in `resume-web/src/lib/career-portfolio.ts`. Stored in `user_profiles.career_portfolio` JSONB (migration `V11`). No certification equivalent exists — you'd add `CertificationItem`/`certifications: []` following the same shape.
- `resume-web/src/pages/WorkspacePage.tsx` also references "experience" (grep hit) — worth a quick look if resume-generation workspace shows experience type breakdowns, but no separate career/education/cert DTOs found there beyond consuming `ExperienceResponse`.
- No other education/career/certification-specific backend entities exist elsewhere (checked `domain/user`, `domain/experience`; the only other hits were the dead `careers`/`achievements`/`projects` tables from V4, item 1).

**Recommendation**: Extend `CareerPortfolio` (JSONB-on-user_profiles pattern, already dashboard-integrated) with a `certifications` array/`CertificationItem` (fields like: name, issuer, issueDate, expiryDate/credentialId) rather than creating new top-level tables — this reuses the exact UI/API pattern (`CareerPortfolioEditor`, `CareerPortfolioOverview`, `CareerPortfolioDto`, `/settings` page) already proven for careers/educations, and requires no new Flyway migration (JSONB column already exists). Then simply shrink `ExperienceType` to the 8 narrative values and update `EXPERIENCE_TYPES` (resume-web) + i18n locale files accordingly.

```text
43	  startDate: '',
44	  endDate: '',
45	  description: '',
46	});
47	
48	export const emptyEducationItem = (): EducationItem => ({
49	  school: '',
50	  major: '',
51	  degree: '',
52	  startDate: '',
53	  endDate: '',
54	  description: '',
55	});
56	
57	export const emptySkillItem = (): SkillItem => ({
58	  name: '',
59	  level: 'intermediate',
60	  category: '',
61	});
62	
63	export const emptyCoverLetter = (): CoverLetterSections => ({
64	  jobExperience: '',
65	  collaboration: '',
66	  growthValues: '',
67	  personality: '',
68	  motivation: '',
69	});
70	
71	export const emptyCareerPortfolio = (): CareerPortfolio => ({
72	  careers: [],
73	  educations: [],
74	  skills: [],
75	  careerStatement: '',
76	  coverLetter: emptyCoverLetter(),
77	});
78	
79	export function normalizeCareerPortfolio(raw?: Partial<CareerPortfolio> | null): CareerPortfolio {
80	  if (!raw) return emptyCareerPortfolio();
81	  return {
82	    careers: raw.careers?.length ? raw.careers : [],
83	    educations: raw.educations?.length ? raw.educations : [],
84	    skills: raw.skills?.length ? raw.skills : [],
85	    careerStatement: raw.careerStatement ?? '',
86	    coverLetter: { ...emptyCoverLetter(), ...raw.coverLetter },
87	  };
88	}
89	
90	export function portfolioCompletion(p: CareerPortfolio): number {
91	  let filled = 0;
92	  const total = 9;
93	  if (p.careers.some((c) => c.company || c.position)) filled++;
94	  if (p.educations.some((e) => e.school)) filled++;
95	  if (p.skills.some((s) => s.name)) filled++;
96	  if (p.careerStatement?.trim()) filled++;
97	  const cl = p.coverLetter;
98	  if (cl.jobExperience?.trim()) filled++;
99	  if (cl.collaboration?.trim()) filled++;
100	  if (cl.growthValues?.trim()) filled++;
101	  if (cl.personality?.trim()) filled++;
102	  if (cl.motivation?.trim()) filled++;
103	  return Math.round((filled / total) * 100);
104	}
105	
106	export const SKILL_LEVELS = ['beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced', 'expert'] as const;
107
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	import i18n from 'i18next';
2	import { initReactI18next } from 'react-i18next';
3	import ko from './locales/ko.json';
4	import en from './locales/en.json';
5	import ja from './locales/ja.json';
6	import zh from './locales/zh.json';
7	
8	export const SUPPORTED_LOCALES = ['ko', 'en', 'ja', 'zh'] as const;
9	export type Locale = (typeof SUPPORTED_LOCALES)[number];
10	
11	const STORAGE_KEY = 'locale';
12	
13	export function resolveLocale(): Locale {
14	  const stored = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
15	  if (stored && SUPPORTED_LOCALES.includes(stored as Locale)) {
16	    return stored as Locale;
17	  }
18	  const nav = navigator.language.toLowerCase();
19	  if (nav.startsWith('ko')) return 'ko';
20	  if (nav.startsWith('ja')) return 'ja';
21	  if (nav.startsWith('zh')) return 'zh';
22	  return 'en';
23	}
24	
25	export function setLocale(locale: Locale) {
26	  localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, locale);
27	  void i18n.changeLanguage(locale);
28	}
29	
30	void i18n.use(initReactI18next).init({
31	  resources: {
32	    ko: { translation: ko },
33	    en: { translation: en },
34	    ja: { translation: ja },
35	    zh: { translation: zh },
36	  },
37	  lng: resolveLocale(),
38	  fallbackLng: 'en',
39	  interpolation: { escapeValue: false },
40	});
41	
42	export default i18n;
43	
44	export const EXPERIENCE_TYPES = [
45	  'PROJECT', 'ACHIEVEMENT', 'CAREER', 'EDUCATION', 'CERTIFICATION',
46	  'COLLABORATION', 'CONFLICT_RESOLUTION', 'PROBLEM_SOLVING', 'LEADERSHIP', 'TECHNOLOGY', 'OTHER',
47	] as const;
48
```

```text
1	package com.resumepilot.presentation.dto.user;
2	
3	import com.resumepilot.domain.user.CareerPortfolio;
4	
5	import java.util.List;
6	
7	public record CareerPortfolioDto(
8	        List<CareerItemDto> careers,
9	        List<EducationItemDto> educations,
10	        List<SkillItemDto> skills,
11	        String careerStatement,
12	        CoverLetterSectionsDto coverLetter
13	) {
14	    public record CareerItemDto(String company, String position, String startDate, String endDate, String description) {}
15	
16	    public record EducationItemDto(String school, String major, String degree, String startDate, String endDate, String description) {}
17	
18	    public record SkillItemDto(String name, String level, String category) {}
19	
20	    public record CoverLetterSectionsDto(
21	            String jobExperience,
22	            String collaboration,
23	            String growthValues,
24	            String personality,
25	            String motivation
26	    ) {}
27	
28	    public static CareerPortfolioDto from(CareerPortfolio portfolio) {
29	        if (portfolio == null) {
30	            return empty();
31	        }
32	        return new CareerPortfolioDto(
33	                portfolio.getCareers() == null ? List.of() : portfolio.getCareers().stream()
34	                        .map(c -> new CareerItemDto(c.getCompany(), c.getPosition(), c.getStartDate(), c.getEndDate(), c.getDescription()))
35	                        .toList(),
36	                portfolio.getEducations() == null ? List.of() : portfolio.getEducations().stream()
37	                        .map(e -> new EducationItemDto(e.getSchool(), e.getMajor(), e.getDegree(), e.getStartDate(), e.getEndDate(), e.getDescription()))
38	                        .toList(),
39	                portfolio.getSkills() == null ? List.of() : portfolio.getSkills().stream()
40	                        .map(s -> new SkillItemDto(s.getName(), s.getLevel(), s.getCategory()))
41	                        .toList(),
42	                portfolio.getCareerStatement(),
43	                portfolio.getCoverLetter() == null ? new CoverLetterSectionsDto(null, null, null, null, null)
44	                        : new CoverLetterSectionsDto(
45	                        portfolio.getCoverLetter().getJobExperience(),
46	                        portfolio.getCoverLetter().getCollaboration(),
47	                        portfolio.getCoverLetter().getGrowthValues(),
48	                        portfolio.getCoverLetter().getPersonality(),
49	                        portfolio.getCoverLetter().getMotivation())
50	        );
51	    }
52	
53	    public static CareerPortfolioDto empty() {
54	        return new CareerPortfolioDto(List.of(), List.of(), List.of(), null,
55	                new CoverLetterSectionsDto(null, null, null, null, null));
56	    }
57	
58	    public CareerPortfolio toEntity() {
59	        CareerPortfolio portfolio = new CareerPortfolio();
60	        if (careers != null) {
61	            portfolio.setCareers(careers.stream()
62	                    .map(c -> CareerPortfolio.CareerItem.builder()
63	                            .company(c.company()).position(c.position())
64	                            .startDate(c.startDate()).endDate(c.endDate()).description(c.description())
65	                            .build())
66	                    .toList());
67	        }
68	        if (educations != null) {
69	            portfolio.setEducations(educations.stream()
70	                    .map(e -> CareerPortfolio.EducationItem.builder()
71	                            .school(e.school()).major(e.major()).degree(e.degree())
72	                            .startDate(e.startDate()).endDate(e.endDate()).description(e.description())
73	                            .build())
74	                    .toList());
75	        }
76	        if (skills != null) {
77	            portfolio.setSkills(skills.stream()
78	                    .map(s -> CareerPortfolio.SkillItem.builder()
79	                            .name(s.name()).level(s.level()).category(s.category())
80	                            .build())
81	                    .toList());
82	        }
83	        portfolio.setCareerStatement(careerStatement);
84	        if (coverLetter != null) {
85	            portfolio.setCoverLetter(CareerPortfolio.CoverLetterSections.builder()
86	                    .jobExperience(coverLetter.jobExperience())
87	                    .collaboration(coverLetter.collaboration())
88	                    .growthValues(coverLetter.growthValues())
89	                    .personality(coverLetter.personality())
90	                    .motivation(coverLetter.motivation())
91	                    .build());
92	        }
93	        return portfolio;
94	    }
95	}
```

Both build cleanly. Implementation summary:

**백엔드** (`resume-api`)
- `ExperienceType`에서 `CAREER`/`EDUCATION`/`CERTIFICATION` 제거 (8개 서술형 타입만 남음)
- `CareerPortfolio`에 `CertificationItem`(name/issuer/issueDate/expiryDate/credentialId) + `certifications` 리스트 추가
- `CareerPortfolioDto` 매핑 갱신 (별도 Flyway 마이그레이션 불필요 — 기존 `user_profiles.career_portfolio` JSONB 컬럼 재사용)

**프론트엔드** (`resume-web`)
- `EXPERIENCE_TYPES`에서 3개 타입 제거 → 경험 라이브러리 드롭다운이 8개로 축소
- `career-portfolio.ts`에 `CertificationItem` 타입/헬퍼 추가
- `CareerPortfolioEditor.tsx`(설정 페이지)에 "자격증" 등록 섹션 추가 — 경력/학력과 동일한 CRUD 카드 패턴
- `CareerPortfolioOverview.tsx`(대시보드)에 자격증 요약 카드 추가
- ko/en/ja/zh 4개 로케일 전부 갱신

백엔드 `gradlew compileJava`, 프론트 `npm run build` 모두 통과했습니다. 이제 대시보드(`/settings`)에서 학력·경력과 나란히 자격증을 등록할 수 있고, 경험 라이브러리(`/experiences`)는 서술형 경험만 다룹니다. 실제 화면에서 확인해보시겠어요?

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-13 12:56:22Z)**_

**"분류"는** `SkillItem.category` 필드예요(career-portfolio.ts:19-22) — 자유 텍스트로 "Backend", "백엔드/서버개발" 같은 태그를 붙이는 용도지, 정해진 값 목록이 있는 건 아닙니다. 지금 UI 그대로 잘 쓰고 계신 게 맞아요.

두 번째 이미지(사람인)처럼 "이력서를 분석해서 스킬을 추천"해주는 기능은 지금 ResumePilot에 없고, 사람인 자체 API도 공개된 게 없어서(비공개 내부 API) 그대로 가져다 쓸 수는 없습니다. 대신 두 방향으로 직접 만들 수 있어요.

1. **정적 자동완성 목록** — `resume-ai`의 `job_analysis_service.py`에 이미 `TECH_KEYWORDS` 셋이 있는데(java, spring, react, docker 등), 이걸 확장한 스킬 사전을 프론트에 내려서 입력창에서 자동완성/추천 칩으로 보여주는 방식. 구현 빠르고 AI 비용 없음.
2. **AI 기반 추천(사람인처럼)** — 사용자의 저장된 경력기술서·이력서 텍스트를 LLM에 보내 "이 사람 경력에 어울리는데 빠진 스킬"을 뽑아주는 새 오퍼레이션(`SKILL_SUGGEST` 같은) 추가. prompt-service에 템플릿 추가 + resume-ai 엔드포인트 + 프론트 버튼 필요, LLM 호출 비용 발생.

추천은 **1번을 먼저 만들고**, 나중에 여유 되면 2번을 얹는 방식이에요. 어느 쪽으로 시작할까요?

```text
7	import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
8	import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;
9	import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;
10	import org.springframework.http.HttpMethod;
11	import org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;
12	import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
13	import org.springframework.security.web.authentication.HttpStatusEntryPoint;
14	import org.springframework.security.authentication.AuthenticationManager;
15	import org.springframework.security.authentication.dao.DaoAuthenticationProvider;
16	import org.springframework.security.config.annotation.authentication.configuration.AuthenticationConfiguration;
17	import org.springframework.security.config.annotation.method.configuration.EnableMethodSecurity;
18	import org.springframework.security.config.annotation.web.builders.HttpSecurity;
19	import org.springframework.security.config.annotation.web.configuration.EnableWebSecurity;
20	import org.springframework.security.config.annotation.web.configurers.AbstractHttpConfigurer;
21	import org.springframework.security.config.http.SessionCreationPolicy;
22	import org.springframework.security.crypto.bcrypt.BCryptPasswordEncoder;
23	import org.springframework.security.crypto.password.PasswordEncoder;
24	import org.springframework.security.web.SecurityFilterChain;
25	import org.springframework.security.web.authentication.UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter;
26	import org.springframework.web.cors.CorsConfiguration;
27	import org.springframework.web.cors.CorsConfigurationSource;
28	import org.springframework.web.cors.UrlBasedCorsConfigurationSource;
29	
30	import java.util.ArrayList;
31	import java.util.List;
32	
33	@Configuration
34	@EnableWebSecurity
35	@EnableMethodSecurity
36	@RequiredArgsConstructor
37	public class SecurityConfig {
38	
39	    private final JwtAuthenticationFilter jwtAuthenticationFilter;
40	    private final InternalApiAuthFilter internalApiAuthFilter;
41	    private final CustomUserDetailsService userDetailsService;
42	
43	    @Value("${cors.allowed-origins:http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:5174}")
44	    private String allowedOrigins;
45	
46	    @Value("${app.spa.enabled:false}")
47	    private boolean spaEnabled;
48	
49	    @Bean
50	    public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {
51	        http
52	                .csrf(AbstractHttpConfigurer::disable)
53	                .cors(cors -> cors.configurationSource(corsConfigurationSource()))
54	                .sessionManagement(s -> s.sessionCreationPolicy(SessionCreationPolicy.STATELESS))
55	                .authorizeHttpRequests(auth -> {
56	                    auth.requestMatchers("/api/v1/auth/**").permitAll()
57	                            .requestMatchers("/api/v1/internal/**").permitAll()
58	                            .requestMatchers("/swagger-ui/**", "/api-docs/**", "/actuator/health").permitAll()
59	                            .requestMatchers(HttpMethod.OPTIONS, "/**").permitAll()
60	                            .requestMatchers("/api/v1/admin/**").hasRole("ADMIN")
61	                            .requestMatchers("/api/**").authenticated();
62	                    if (spaEnabled) {
63	                        auth.anyRequest().permitAll();
64	                    } else {
65	                        auth.anyRequest().authenticated();
66	                    }
67	                })
68	                .authenticationProvider(authenticationProvider())
69	                .addFilterBefore(internalApiAuthFilter, UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter.class)
70	                .addFilterBefore(jwtAuthenticationFilter, UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter.class)
71	                .exceptionHandling(ex -> ex
72	                        .authenticationEntryPoint(new HttpStatusEntryPoint(HttpStatus.UNAUTHORIZED))
73	                        .accessDeniedHandler((request, response, accessDenied) -> {
74	                            var auth = org.springframework.security.core.context.SecurityContextHolder
75	                                    .getContext().getAuthentication();
76	                            boolean anonymous = auth == null || !auth.isAuthenticated()
77	                                    || "anonymousUser".equals(auth.getPrincipal());
78	                            response.setStatus(anonymous ? HttpStatus.UNAUTHORIZED.value()
79	                                    : HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN.value());
80	                            response.setContentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE);
81	                            String code = anonymous ? "UNAUTHORIZED" : "FORBIDDEN";
82	                            String message = anonymous ? "Authentication required" : "Access denied";
83	                            response.getWriter().write(
84	                                    "{\"success\":false,\"error\":{\"code\":\"" + code
85	                                            + "\",\"message\":\"" + message + "\"}}");
86	                        }));
87	        return http.build();
88	    }
89	
90	    @Bean
91	    public DaoAuthenticationProvider authenticationProvider() {
92	        DaoAuthenticationProvider provider = new DaoAuthenticationProvider();
93	        provider.setUserDetailsService(userDetailsService);
94	        provider.setPasswordEncoder(passwordEncoder());
95	        return provider;
96	    }
97	
98	    @Bean
99	    public PasswordEncoder passwordEncoder() {
100	        return new BCryptPasswordEncoder();
101	    }
102	
103	    @Bean
104	    public AuthenticationManager authenticationManager(AuthenticationConfiguration config) throws Exception {
105	        return config.getAuthenticationManager();
106	    }
107	
108	    @Bean
109	    public CorsConfigurationSource corsConfigurationSource() {
110	        CorsConfiguration config = new CorsConfiguration();
111	        var origins = List.of(allowedOrigins.split(",")).stream()
112	                .map(String::trim)
113	                .filter(s -> !s.isEmpty())
114	                .toList();
115	
116	        // allowedOrigins + allowedOriginPatterns 동시 사용 시 Quick Tunnel 등에서 CORS 403 가능 → patterns만 사용
117	        var patterns = new ArrayList<String>();
118	        patterns.add("https://*.trycloudflare.com");
119	        patterns.add("http://localhost:*");
120	        patterns.add("http://127.0.0.1:*");
121	        patterns.add("http://192.168.*:*");
122	        patterns.add("https://192.168.*:*");
123	        patterns.addAll(origins);
124	        config.setAllowedOriginPatterns(patterns);
125	
126	        config.setAllowedMethods(List.of("GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"));
127	        config.setAllowedHeaders(List.of("*"));
128	        config.setAllowCredentials(true);
129	        config.setMaxAge(3600L);
130	        UrlBasedCorsConfigurationSource source = new UrlBasedCorsConfigurationSource();
131	        source.registerCorsConfiguration("/**", config);
132	        return source;
133	    }
134	}
```

```java
package com.resumepilot.domain.skill;

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import lombok.Getter;
import lombok.NoArgsConstructor;
import org.hibernate.annotations.CreationTimestamp;

import java.time.Instant;

@Entity
@Table(name = "skill_catalog")
@Getter
@NoArgsConstructor
public class SkillCatalogItem {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)
    private Long id;

    @Column(nullable = false, unique = true)
    private String name;

    @Column(nullable = false)
    private String category;

    @CreationTimestamp
    @Column(name = "created_at", updatable = false)
    private Instant createdAt;
}

```

```java
package com.resumepilot.presentation.controller;

import com.resumepilot.domain.skill.SkillCatalogRepository;
import com.resumepilot.global.response.ApiResponse;
import com.resumepilot.presentation.dto.skill.SkillCatalogResponse;
import io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations.Operation;
import io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations.tags.Tag;
import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;

import java.util.List;

@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/v1/skill-catalog")
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@Tag(name = "SkillCatalog")
public class SkillCatalogController {

    private final SkillCatalogRepository skillCatalogRepository;

    @GetMapping
    @Operation(summary = "스킬 카탈로그 목록")
    public ApiResponse<List<SkillCatalogResponse>> list() {
        return ApiResponse.ok(skillCatalogRepository.findAllByOrderByCategoryAscNameAsc().stream()
                .map(SkillCatalogResponse::from)
                .toList());
    }
}

```
