74	          </ItemCard>
75	        ))}
76	        <AddButton label={t('portfolio.addCertification')} onClick={() => patch({ certifications: [...value.certifications, emptyCertificationItem()] })} />
77	      </Section>
78	
79	      <Section title={t('portfolio.skills')} subtitle={t('portfolio.skillsHint')}>
80	        <div className="mb-3 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
81	          {value.skills.map((s, i) => (
82	            <Badge key={i} variant="secondary" className="gap-1.5 pr-1">
83	              {s.name}
84	              <button
85	                type="button"
86	                onClick={() => patch({ skills: value.skills.filter((_, j) => j !== i) })}
87	                className="rounded-full px-1 hover:bg-muted"
88	              >
89	                ×
90	              </button>
91	            </Badge>
92	          ))}
93	        </div>
94	        <SuggestedSkills existing={value.skills.map((s) => s.name)} onAdd={(name, category) => patch({ skills: [...value.skills, { name, level: 'intermediate', category }] })} />
95	
96	        <Card size="sm">
97	          <CardContent className="grid gap-3 pt-4 sm:grid-cols-3">
98	            <SkillInput
99	              placeholder={t('portfolio.skillName')}
100	              onAdd={(name, level, category) => {
101	                if (!name.trim()) return;
102	                patch({ skills: [...value.skills, { name: name.trim(), level, category }] });
103	              }}
104	            />
105	          </CardContent>
106	        </Card>
107	      </Section>
108	
109	      <Section title={t('portfolio.careerStatement')} subtitle={t('portfolio.careerStatementHint')}>
110	        <Textarea
111	          rows={8}
112	          value={value.careerStatement}
113	          onChange={(e) => patch({ careerStatement: e.target.value })}
114	          placeholder={t('portfolio.careerStatementPlaceholder')}
115	        />
116	      </Section>
117	
118	      <Section title={t('portfolio.coverLetter')} subtitle={t('portfolio.coverLetterHint')}>
119	        <div className="space-y-4">
120	          <CoverField label={`5-1. ${t('portfolio.section51')}`} value={value.coverLetter.jobExperience} onChange={(v) => patch({ coverLetter: { ...value.coverLetter, jobExperience: v } })} />
121	          <CoverField label={`5-2. ${t('portfolio.section52')}`} value={value.coverLetter.collaboration} onChange={(v) => patch({ coverLetter: { ...value.coverLetter, collaboration: v } })} />
122	          <CoverField label={`5-3. ${t('portfolio.section53')}`} value={value.coverLetter.growthValues} onChange={(v) => patch({ coverLetter: { ...value.coverLetter, growthValues: v } })} />
123	          <CoverField label={`5-4. ${t('portfolio.section54')}`} value={value.coverLetter.personality} onChange={(v) => patch({ coverLetter: { ...value.coverLetter, personality: v } })} />
124	          <CoverField label={`5-5. ${t('portfolio.section55')}`} value={value.coverLetter.motivation} onChange={(v) => patch({ coverLetter: { ...value.coverLetter, motivation: v } })} />
125	        </div>
126	      </Section>
127	    </div>
128	  );
129	}
130	
131	function Section({ title, subtitle, children }: { title: string; subtitle?: string; children: React.ReactNode }) {
132	  return (
133	    <section>
134	      <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight">{title}</h3>
135	      {subtitle && <p className="mt-1 mb-4 text-sm text-muted-foreground">{subtitle}</p>}
136	      {!subtitle && <div className="mb-4" />}
137	      <div className="space-y-3">{children}</div>
138	    </section>
139	  );
140	}
141	
142	function ItemCard({ children, onRemove }: { children: React.ReactNode; onRemove: () => void }) {
143	  const { t } = useTranslation();
144	  return (
145	    <Card size="sm">
146	      <CardContent className="pt-4">
147	        <div className="mb-2 flex justify-end">
148	          <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="text-destructive" onClick={onRemove}>
149	            {t('common.delete')}
150	          </Button>
151	        </div>
152	        {children}
153	      </CardContent>
154	    </Card>
155	  );
156	}
157	
158	function AddButton({ label, onClick }: { label: string; onClick: () => void }) {
159	  return (
160	    <Button variant="outline" className="w-full border-dashed" onClick={onClick}>
161	      + {label}
162	    </Button>
163	  );
164	}
165	
166	function CareerFields({ item, onChange }: { item: CareerItem; onChange: (v: CareerItem) => void }) {
167	  const { t } = useTranslation();
168	  const set = (k: keyof CareerItem, v: string) => onChange({ ...item, [k]: v });
169	  return (
170	    <div className="grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2">
171	      <Field label={t('portfolio.company')} value={item.company} onChange={(v) => set('company', v)} />
172	      <Field label={t('portfolio.position')} value={item.position} onChange={(v) => set('position', v)} />
173	      <Field label={t('portfolio.startDate')} value={item.startDate} onChange={(v) => set('startDate', v)} placeholder="2022-03" />
174	      <Field label={t('portfolio.endDate')} value={item.endDate} onChange={(v) => set('endDate', v)} placeholder={t('portfolio.present')} />
175	      <div className="sm:col-span-2 space-y-2">
176	        <Label>{t('portfolio.description')}</Label>
177	        <Textarea rows={3} value={item.description} onChange={(e) => set('description', e.target.value)} />
178	      </div>
179	    </div>
180	  );
181	}
182	
183	function EducationFields({ item, onChange }: { item: EducationItem; onChange: (v: EducationItem) => void }) {
184	  const { t } = useTranslation();
185	  const set = (k: keyof EducationItem, v: string) => onChange({ ...item, [k]: v });
186	  return (
187	    <div className="grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2">
188	      <Field label={t('portfolio.school')} value={item.school} onChange={(v) => set('school', v)} />
189	      <Field label={t('portfolio.major')} value={item.major} onChange={(v) => set('major', v)} />
190	      <Field label={t('portfolio.degree')} value={item.degree} onChange={(v) => set('degree', v)} />
191	      <Field label={t('portfolio.startDate')} value={item.startDate} onChange={(v) => set('startDate', v)} />
192	      <Field label={t('portfolio.endDate')} value={item.endDate} onChange={(v) => set('endDate', v)} />
193	    </div>
194	  );
195	}
196	
197	function CertificationFields({ item, onChange }: { item: CertificationItem; onChange: (v: CertificationItem) => void }) {
198	  const { t } = useTranslation();
199	  const set = (k: keyof CertificationItem, v: string) => onChange({ ...item, [k]: v });
200	  return (
201	    <div className="grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2">
202	      <Field label={t('portfolio.certName')} value={item.name} onChange={(v) => set('name', v)} />
203	      <Field label={t('portfolio.issuer')} value={item.issuer} onChange={(v) => set('issuer', v)} />
204	      <Field label={t('portfolio.issueDate')} value={item.issueDate} onChange={(v) => set('issueDate', v)} placeholder="2022-03" />
205	      <Field label={t('portfolio.expiryDate')} value={item.expiryDate} onChange={(v) => set('expiryDate', v)} />
206	      <Field label={t('portfolio.credentialId')} value={item.credentialId} onChange={(v) => set('credentialId', v)} className="sm:col-span-2" />
207	    </div>
208	  );
209	}
210	
211	function Field({
212	  label, value, onChange, placeholder, readOnly, className = '',
213	}: {
214	  label: string; value: string; onChange: (v: string) => void; placeholder?: string; readOnly?: boolean; className?: string;
215	}) {
216	  return (
217	    <div className={className}>
218	      <Label className="mb-1.5">{label}</Label>
219	      <Input readOnly={readOnly} value={value} placeholder={placeholder} onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)} />
220	    </div>
221	  );
222	}
223	
224	function SuggestedSkills({ existing, onAdd }: { existing: string[]; onAdd: (name: string, category: string) => void }) {
225	  const { t } = useTranslation();
226	  const existingLower = new Set(existing.map((n) => n.toLowerCase()));
227	  const groups = SKILL_CATALOG.map((g) => ({
228	    category: g.category,
229	    items: g.items.filter((item) => !existingLower.has(item.toLowerCase())),
230	  })).filter((g) => g.items.length > 0);
231	
232	  if (groups.length === 0) return null;
233	
234	  return (
235	    <div className="mb-4 space-y-2">
236	      <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">{t('portfolio.suggestedSkills')}</p>
237	      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
238	        {groups
239	          .flatMap((g) => g.items.map((item) => ({ item, category: g.category })))
240	          .slice(0, 24)
241	          .map(({ item, category }) => (
242	            <button
243	              key={item}
244	              type="button"
245	              onClick={() => onAdd(item, category)}
246	              className="rounded-full border border-dashed border-input px-2.5 py-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground transition-colors hover:border-primary hover:text-primary"
247	            >
248	              + {item}
249	            </button>
250	          ))}
251	      </div>
252	    </div>
253	  );
254	}
255	
256	function SkillInput({ placeholder, onAdd }: { placeholder: string; onAdd: (name: string, level: string, category: string) => void }) {
257	  const { t } = useTranslation();
258	  const [name, setName] = useState('');
259	  const [level, setLevel] = useState('intermediate');
260	  const [category, setCategory] = useState('');
261	
262	  return (
263	    <>
264	      <Input list="skill-catalog-list" placeholder={placeholder} value={name} onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)} />
265	      <datalist id="skill-catalog-list">
266	        {SKILL_CATALOG.flatMap((g) => g.items).map((item) => (
267	          <option key={item} value={item} />
268	        ))}
269	      </datalist>
270	      <Select value={level} onValueChange={setLevel}>
271	        <SelectTrigger>
272	          <SelectValue />
273	        </SelectTrigger>
274	        <SelectContent>
275	          {SKILL_LEVELS.map((l) => (
276	            <SelectItem key={l} value={l}>{t(`portfolio.skillLevel.${l}`)}</SelectItem>
277	          ))}
278	        </SelectContent>
279	      </Select>
280	      <div className="flex gap-2 sm:col-span-3">
281	        <Input placeholder={t('portfolio.skillCategory')} value={category} onChange={(e) => setCategory(e.target.value)} />
282	        <Button
283	          type="button"
284	          onClick={() => {
285	            onAdd(name, level, category);
286	            setName('');
287	            setCategory('');
288	          }}
289	        >
290	          {t('common.save')}
291	        </Button>
292	      </div>
293	    </>
294	  );
295	}
296	
297	function CoverField({ label, value, onChange }: { label: string; value: string; onChange: (v: string) => void }) {
298	  return (
299	    <Card size="sm">
300	      <CardHeader>
301	        <CardTitle className="text-sm text-primary">{label}</CardTitle>
302	      </CardHeader>
303	      <CardContent>
304	        <Textarea rows={4} value={value} onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)} />
305	      </CardContent>
306	    </Card>
307	  );
308	}
309
```

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-13 13:07:48Z)**_

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-13 13:07:54Z)**_

구현 완료했습니다.

**백엔드**
- `skill_catalog` 테이블 신설(`V23__skill_catalog.sql`) — DB 값입니다. 이제 스택은 하드코딩이 아니라 DB에서 관리됩니다.
- `GET /api/v1/skill-catalog` 엔드포인트로 목록 제공 (카테고리별 정렬)

**프론트엔드** (`CareerPortfolioEditor.tsx`)
- 검색창에 포커스하면 드롭다운 패널이 열리고, **체크박스로 여러 스킬을 한 번에 선택** 가능
- 목록은 `max-h-64 overflow-y-auto`로 **스크롤 가능**
- 체크한 항목마다 옆에 **레벨 select(초급/중급/고급/전문가)**가 나타나며, 기본값은 "중급"
- 하단에 "N개 선택됨" + "선택한 스킬 추가" 버튼으로 한 번에 일괄 추가
- 이미 등록된 스킬은 목록에서 자동 제외
- 바깥 클릭하면 패널 닫힘

20	type CompanyRow = { id: string; name: string; culture?: string; hiringKeywords: string[] };

22	export default function CompaniesPage() {
23	  const { t } = useTranslation();
24	  const queryClient = useQueryClient();
25	  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
26	  const [editId, setEditId] = useState<string | null>(null);
27	  const [culture, setCulture] = useState('');
28	  const [keywords, setKeywords] = useState('');
29	
30	  const { data = [], isLoading } = useQuery({ queryKey: ['admin-companies'], queryFn: api.listCompanies });
31	
32	  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
33	    const q = search.trim().toLowerCase();
34	    if (!q) return data as CompanyRow[];
35	    return (data as CompanyRow[]).filter(
36	      (c) =>
37	        c.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
38	        (c.culture?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ?? false) ||
39	        c.hiringKeywords?.some((k) => k.toLowerCase().includes(q)),
40	    );
41	  }, [data, search]);
42	
43	  const comparators = useMemo(
44	    () => ({
45	      name: (a: CompanyRow, b: CompanyRow) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name),
46	      culture: (a: CompanyRow, b: CompanyRow) => (a.culture ?? '').localeCompare(b.culture ?? ''),
47	    }),
48	    [],
49	  );
50	
51	  const { sorted, sortKey, direction, toggleSort } = useUrlSort(filtered, comparators, 'name');
52	  const { page, setPage, totalPages, paginated, from, to, total } = useUrlPagination(sorted, 10);
53	
54	  const updateMutation = useMutation({
55	    mutationFn: (id: string) =>
56	      api.updateCompany(id, {
57	        culture,
58	        hiringKeywords: keywords.split(',').map((k) => k.trim()).filter(Boolean),
59	      }),
60	    onSuccess: () => {
61	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['admin-companies'] });
62	      setEditId(null);
63	    },
64	  });
65	
66	  return (
67	    <div className="space-y-4">
68	      <PageHeader title={t('companies.title')} />
69	      {isLoading ? (
70	        <DataTableCard>
71	          <Table>
72	            <TableHeader>
73	              <TableRow>
74	                <TableHead>{t('companies.name')}</TableHead>
75	              </TableRow>
76	            </TableHeader>
77	            <TableSkeletonRows rows={5} cols={4} />
78	          </Table>
79	        </DataTableCard>
80	      ) : (data as CompanyRow[]).length === 0 ? (
81	        <EmptyState title={t('companies.empty', { defaultValue: t('aiLogs.empty') })} />
82	      ) : (
83	        <DataTableCard
84	          toolbar={<SearchBar value={search} onChange={setSearch} placeholder={t('common.searchPlaceholder')} />}
85	          footer={
86	            <PaginationControls page={page} totalPages={totalPages} from={from} to={to} total={total} onPageChange={setPage} className="w-full" />
87	          }
88	        >
89	          {paginated.length === 0 ? (
90	            <p className="p-8 text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground">{t('common.noResults')}</p>
91	          ) : (
92	            <Table>
93	              <TableHeader>
94	                <TableRow>
95	                  <SortableTableHead label={t('companies.name')} sortKey="name" activeKey={sortKey} direction={direction} onSort={toggleSort} />
96	                  <SortableTableHead label={t('companies.culture')} sortKey="culture" activeKey={sortKey} direction={direction} onSort={toggleSort} />
97	                  <TableHead>{t('companies.hiringKeywords')}</TableHead>
98	                  <TableHead className="text-right">{t('common.edit')}</TableHead>
99	                </TableRow>
100	              </TableHeader>
101	              <TableBody>
102	                {paginated.map((c) => (
103	                  <TableRow key={c.id}>
104	                    <TableCell className="font-medium">{c.name}</TableCell>
105	                    <TableCell className="text-muted-foreground max-w-[200px] truncate">{c.culture || '—'}</TableCell>
106	                    <TableCell className="text-muted-foreground max-w-[240px] truncate">
107	                      {c.hiringKeywords?.join(', ') || '—'}
108	                    </TableCell>
109	                    <TableCell className="text-right">
110	                      <Button
111	                        variant="ghost"
112	                        size="sm"
113	                        onClick={() => {
114	                          setEditId(c.id);
115	                          setCulture(c.culture || '');
116	                          setKeywords((c.hiringKeywords || []).join(', '));
117	                        }}
118	                      >
119	                        {t('common.edit')}
120	                      </Button>
121	                    </TableCell>
122	                  </TableRow>
123	                ))}
124	              </TableBody>
125	            </Table>
126	          )}
127	        </DataTableCard>
128	      )}
129	
130	      {editId && (
131	        <Card className="max-w-lg">
132	          <CardHeader>
133	            <CardTitle>{t('companies.editCompany')}</CardTitle>
134	          </CardHeader>
135	          <form
136	            onSubmit={(e) => {
137	              e.preventDefault();
138	              updateMutation.mutate(editId);
139	            }}
140	          >
141	            <CardContent className="space-y-3">
142	              <div className="space-y-2">
143	                <Label>{t('companies.orgCulture')}</Label>
144	                <Input value={culture} onChange={(e) => setCulture(e.target.value)} />
145	              </div>
146	              <div className="space-y-2">
147	                <Label>{t('companies.keywordsPlaceholder')}</Label>
148	                <Input value={keywords} onChange={(e) => setKeywords(e.target.value)} />
149	              </div>
150	              <Button type="submit">{t('common.save')}</Button>
151	            </CardContent>
152	          </form>
153	        </Card>
154	      )}
155	    </div>
156	  );
157	}
158
```

2	import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
3	import { QueryClient, QueryClientProvider } from '@tanstack/react-query';
4	import { ThemeProvider } from '@/lib/theme';
5	import { TooltipProvider } from '@/components/ui/tooltip';
6	import { ErrorBoundary } from '@/components/common/error-boundary';
7	import { LoadingSpinner } from '@/components/common/loading-state';
8	import { AdminLayout } from './components/AdminLayout';
9	
10	const LoginPage = lazy(() => import('./pages/LoginPage'));
11	const PromptsPage = lazy(() => import('./pages/PromptsPage'));
12	const ForbiddenPage = lazy(() => import('./pages/ForbiddenPage'));
13	const CompaniesPage = lazy(() => import('./pages/CompaniesPage'));
14	const UsersPage = lazy(() => import('./pages/UsersPage'));
15	const AiLogsPage = lazy(() => import('./pages/AiLogsPage'));
16	const DeployCiSettingsPage = lazy(() => import('./pages/DeployCiSettingsPage'));
17	const LlmSettingsPage = lazy(() => import('./pages/LlmSettingsPage'));
18	
19	const queryClient = new QueryClient();
20	const adminBase = (import.meta.env.BASE_URL || '/admin/').replace(/\/$/, '') || '/admin';
21	
22	function PageFallback() {
23	  return <LoadingSpinner className="min-h-[50vh]" />;
24	}
25	
26	export default function App() {
27	  return (
28	    <ErrorBoundary>
29	      <ThemeProvider>
30	        <TooltipProvider>
31	          <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>
32	          <BrowserRouter basename={adminBase}>
33	            <Suspense fallback={<PageFallback />}>
34	              <Routes>
35	                <Route path="/login" element={<LoginPage />} />
36	                <Route element={<AdminLayout />}>
37	                  <Route path="/prompts" element={<PromptsPage />} />
38	                  <Route path="/forbidden-expressions" element={<ForbiddenPage />} />
39	                  <Route path="/companies" element={<CompaniesPage />} />
40	                  <Route path="/users" element={<UsersPage />} />
41	                  <Route path="/ai-logs" element={<AiLogsPage />} />
42	                  <Route path="/llm-settings" element={<LlmSettingsPage />} />
43	                  <Route path="/deploy-ci-settings" element={<DeployCiSettingsPage />} />
44	                </Route>
45	                <Route path="*" element={<Navigate to="/prompts" replace />} />
46	              </Routes>
47	            </Suspense>
48	          </BrowserRouter>
49	        </QueryClientProvider>
50	      </TooltipProvider>
51	      </ThemeProvider>
52	    </ErrorBoundary>
53	  );
54	}
55

3	const API_URL = resolveApiUrl();

5	export interface ApiResponse<T> {
6	  success: boolean;
7	  data: T;
8	  error?: { code: string; message: string };
9	}
10	
11	function getAccessToken(): string | null {
12	  return localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
13	}
14	
15	export { getAccessToken };
16	
17	export function getUserRole(): string | null {
18	  return localStorage.getItem('userRole');
19	}
20	
21	export function setTokens(access: string, refresh: string, role?: string) {
22	  localStorage.setItem('accessToken', access);
23	  localStorage.setItem('refreshToken', refresh);
24	  if (role) {
25	    localStorage.setItem('userRole', role);
26	  }
27	}
28	
29	export function clearTokens() {
30	  localStorage.removeItem('accessToken');
31	  localStorage.removeItem('refreshToken');
32	  localStorage.removeItem('userRole');
33	}
34	
35	async function request<T>(path: string, options: RequestInit = {}): Promise<T> {
36	  const headers: Record<string, string> = {
37	    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
38	    ...(options.headers as Record<string, string>),
39	  };
40	  const token = getAccessToken();
41	  if (token) headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;
42	
43	  const response = await fetch(`${API_URL}${path}`, { ...options, headers });
44	  const json: ApiResponse<T> = await response.json();
45	  if (!response.ok || !json.success) {
46	    throw new Error(json.error?.message || 'Request failed');
47	  }
48	  return json.data;
49	}
50

Based on the Stack Overflow Developer Survey 2024 results, here are the most popular technologies:

## Programming Languages
JavaScript (62%), HTML/CSS (53%), and Python (51%) top the list of most used languages for the second year in a row. Additionally, Rust is the language that most developers used and want to use again with an 83% admiration rate for the second year in a row.

## Web Frameworks
.NET is the most used among other frameworks and libraries for all developers. 73% of developers that used Svelte want to keep working with it.

## Databases
PostgreSQL is used by 49% of developers and is the most popular database for the second year in a row.

## Developer Tools
Docker is used the most by professional developers (59%) and npm is used the most by developers learning to code (45%). Docker users have elevated this tool to most-admired (78%) this year along with being most-desired for the second year in a row.

## Cloud Platforms
Hetzner is the most-admired cloud platform for the second year in a row with a 75% admire score.

The survey was conducted in May 2024 with over 65,000 developers responded to the survey about coding, the technologies and tools they use and want to learn, AI, and developer experience at work.

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-13 13:18:42Z)**_

The `skill_catalog` table already exists (migration V23). Full findings below.

## 1. resume-admin structure

- Pages: `resume-admin/src/pages/*.tsx` — best model for a plain CRUD page is `CompaniesPage.tsx` (list + search + sort + pagination + inline edit form). Uses hooks `useUrlPagination`, `useUrlSort`, shared components `PageHeader`, `SearchBar`, `DataTableCard`, `SortableTableHead`, `TableSkeletonRows`, `EmptyState`, `PaginationControls` (all in `src/components/common/`).
- Routing: `resume-admin/src/App.tsx:10-46` — lazy-loaded pages registered as `<Route>` inside the protected `<Route element={<AdminLayout />}>` block (App.tsx:36-44). Add new lazy import + route there, and a sidebar entry in `resume-admin/src/components/admin-sidebar.tsx` (not read in full but referenced from AdminLayout.tsx:3).
- API client: `resume-admin/src/lib/api.ts` — single `api` object with typed methods calling a shared `request<T>()` helper (api.ts:35-49). Base URL from `resolveApiUrl()` in `src/lib/api-base.ts` (api.ts:1,3). Auth: Bearer token from `localStorage.getItem('accessToken')` attached as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header (api.ts:11-13, 40-41). All responses unwrap `ApiResponse<T>{success,data,error}` (api.ts:5-9, 44-48). Existing CRUD example: `listCompanies`/`updateCompany` (api.ts:107-109), `listLlmProviders`/`updateLlmProvider` (api.ts:132-159).
- UI library: shadcn/Radix — `@radix-ui/react-switch` etc. + `class-variance-authority` in `resume-admin/package.json:15,18`; components under `src/components/ui/*` (Table, Button, Card, Input, Label, Sidebar, Tooltip) same pattern as resume-web.

## 2. Backend admin controller example

Full file `resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/presentation/controller/AdminLlmController.java`:

```java
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/v1/admin/llm")
@RequiredArgsConstructor
@Tag(name = "Admin LLM")
public class AdminLlmController {
    private final LlmAdminService llmAdminService;

    @GetMapping("/providers")
    public ApiResponse<List<LlmProviderResponse>> listProviders() {
        return ApiResponse.ok(llmAdminService.listProviders());
    }

    @PatchMapping("/providers/{id}")
    public ApiResponse<LlmProviderResponse> updateProvider(
            @PathVariable UUID id,
            @Valid @RequestBody LlmProviderUpdateRequest req) {
        return ApiResponse.ok(llmAdminService.updateProvider(id, req));
    }
    // ... similar GET/PATCH for /routes
}
```

DTOs (`resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/presentation/dto/admin/`):
- `LlmProviderResponse.java`: `record LlmProviderResponse(UUID id, String slug, String displayName, String providerType, String baseUrl, boolean enabled, boolean hasApiKey, String apiKeyMasked)`
- `LlmProviderUpdateRequest.java`: `record LlmProviderUpdateRequest(@NotBlank String displayName, String baseUrl, Boolean enabled, String apiKey)`

Security: `resume-api/src/main/java/com/resumepilot/global/config/SecurityConfig.java:60` — `.requestMatchers("/api/v1/admin/**").hasRole("ADMIN")`. So any controller under `/api/v1/admin/**` is auto-secured; no extra `@PreAuthorize` needed. Response wrapper is `ApiResponse.ok(...)` from `com.resumepilot.global.response.ApiResponse`.

Note: `skill_catalog` table already exists via migration `resume-api/src/main/resources/db/migration/V23__skill_catalog.sql` (columns: `id BIGSERIAL`, `name VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE`, `category VARCHAR(50)`, `created_at`, plus an index on `category` and seed data). No new migration needed for the table itself — a new admin controller/service/DTOs should build directly on this table (next Flyway file would be `V24__...sql` if any schema tweak is needed, e.g. adding delete-safety or audit columns).

## 3. Admin auth

- Login page: `resume-admin/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx` posts to `api.login()` → `POST /api/v1/auth/login` (api.ts:52-56), returns `{accessToken, refreshToken, role}`.
- Tokens stored via `setTokens()` in `localStorage` keys `accessToken`, `refreshToken`, `userRole` (api.ts:21-27); cleared via `clearTokens()` (api.ts:29-33).
- Route guard: `resume-admin/src/components/AdminLayout.tsx:9-15` — redirects to `/login` if no access token or `getUserRole() !== 'ADMIN'`.
- Every API call attaches `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>` header automatically inside `request()` (api.ts:40-41) — no per-page auth wiring needed.

## 4. Reusable table/list components

Yes — mimic `CompaniesPage.tsx` / the LLM providers page exactly:
- `resume-admin/src/components/common/data-table-card.tsx` — card wrapper with `toolbar`/`footer` slots.
- `resume-admin/src/components/common/search-bar.tsx` — controlled search input.
- `resume-admin/src/components/common/sortable-table-head.tsx` — clickable sortable `<TableHead>`.
- `resume-admin/src/components/common/pagination-controls.tsx` — pager, paired with hook `resume-admin/src/hooks/use-url-pagination.ts`.
- `resume-admin/src/hooks/use-url-sort.ts` — sort state synced to URL.
- `resume-admin/src/components/common/table-skeleton.tsx` (`TableSkeletonRows`) and `resume-admin/src/components/common/empty-state.tsx` (`EmptyState`) for loading/empty states.
- `resume-admin/src/components/PageHeader.tsx` for page title.

None of the existing pages show a delete action (Companies/LLM only edit); for skill_catalog's create+delete you'll add a "Create" form (similar inline `<Card>` form pattern at CompaniesPage.tsx:130-154) and a delete button next to edit using `api.deleteForbidden`-style pattern already present for forbidden-expressions (api.ts:96-101) as the closest full CRUD (list/create/delete) reference — see `resume-admin/src/pages/ForbiddenPage.tsx` for that create/delete UI pattern, which is likely the best template to copy for skill_catalog (name+category is structurally identical to expression+suggestion) rather than CompaniesPage.

20	type ForbiddenRow = { id: string; expression: string; suggestion?: string };
21	
22	export default function ForbiddenPage() {

24	  const queryClient = useQueryClient();
25	  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
26	  const [expression, setExpression] = useState('');
27	  const [suggestion, setSuggestion] = useState('');
28	
29	  const { data = [], isLoading } = useQuery({ queryKey: ['admin-forbidden'], queryFn: api.listForbidden });
30	
31	  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
32	    const q = search.trim().toLowerCase();
33	    if (!q) return data as ForbiddenRow[];
34	    return (data as ForbiddenRow[]).filter(
35	      (f) =>
36	        f.expression.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
37	        (f.suggestion?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ?? false),
38	    );
39	  }, [data, search]);
40	
41	  const comparators = useMemo(
42	    () => ({
43	      expression: (a: ForbiddenRow, b: ForbiddenRow) => a.expression.localeCompare(b.expression),
44	    }),
45	    [],
46	  );
47	
48	  const { sorted, sortKey, direction, toggleSort } = useUrlSort(filtered, comparators, 'expression');
49	  const { page, setPage, totalPages, paginated, from, to, total } = useUrlPagination(sorted, 10);
50	
51	  const createMutation = useMutation({
52	    mutationFn: () => api.createForbidden(expression, suggestion),
53	    onSuccess: () => {
54	      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['admin-forbidden'] });
55	      setExpression('');
56	      setSuggestion('');
57	    },
58	  });
59	
60	  return (
61	    <div className="space-y-6">
62	      <PageHeader title={t('forbidden.title')} />
63	      <Card className="max-w-lg">
64	        <CardHeader>
65	          <CardTitle>{t('common.add')}</CardTitle>
66	        </CardHeader>
67	        <form
68	          onSubmit={(e) => {
69	            e.preventDefault();
70	            createMutation.mutate();
71	          }}
72	        >
73	          <CardContent className="space-y-3">
74	            <div className="space-y-2">
75	              <Label>{t('forbidden.expression')}</Label>
76	              <Input value={expression} onChange={(e) => setExpression(e.target.value)} required />
77	            </div>
78	            <div className="space-y-2">
79	              <Label>{t('forbidden.suggestion')}</Label>
80	              <Input value={suggestion} onChange={(e) => setSuggestion(e.target.value)} />
81	            </div>
82	            <Button type="submit">{t('common.add')}</Button>
83	          </CardContent>
84	        </form>
85	      </Card>
86	
87	      {isLoading ? (
88	        <DataTableCard>
89	          <Table>
90	            <TableHeader>
91	              <TableRow>
92	                <TableHead>{t('forbidden.expression')}</TableHead>
93	              </TableRow>
94	            </TableHeader>
95	            <TableSkeletonRows rows={5} cols={3} />
96	          </Table>
97	        </DataTableCard>
98	      ) : (data as ForbiddenRow[]).length === 0 ? (
99	        <EmptyState title={t('forbidden.empty', { defaultValue: t('aiLogs.empty') })} />
100	      ) : (
101	        <DataTableCard
102	          toolbar={<SearchBar value={search} onChange={setSearch} placeholder={t('common.searchPlaceholder')} />}
103	          footer={
104	            <PaginationControls page={page} totalPages={totalPages} from={from} to={to} total={total} onPageChange={setPage} className="w-full" />
105	          }
106	        >
107	          {paginated.length === 0 ? (
108	            <p className="p-8 text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground">{t('common.noResults')}</p>
109	          ) : (
110	            <Table>
111	              <TableHeader>
112	                <TableRow>
113	                  <SortableTableHead label={t('forbidden.expression')} sortKey="expression" activeKey={sortKey} direction={direction} onSort={toggleSort} />
114	                  <TableHead>{t('forbidden.suggestion')}</TableHead>
115	                  <TableHead className="text-right">{t('common.delete')}</TableHead>
116	                </TableRow>
117	              </TableHeader>
118	              <TableBody>
119	                {paginated.map((f) => (
120	                  <TableRow key={f.id}>
121	                    <TableCell className="font-medium">{f.expression}</TableCell>
122	                    <TableCell className="text-muted-foreground">{f.suggestion || '—'}</TableCell>
123	                    <TableCell className="text-right">
124	                      <Button
125	                        variant="ghost"
126	                        size="sm"
127	                        className="text-destructive"
128	                        onClick={() =>
129	                          api.deleteForbidden(f.id).then(() => queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['admin-forbidden'] }))
130	                        }
131	                      >
132	                        {t('common.delete')}
133	                      </Button>
134	                    </TableCell>
135	                  </TableRow>
136	                ))}
137	              </TableBody>
138	            </Table>
139	          )}
140	        </DataTableCard>
141	      )}
142	    </div>
143	  );
144	}
145

13	import com.resumepilot.infrastructure.ai.PromptServiceClient;
14	import com.resumepilot.presentation.dto.admin.*;
15	import com.resumepilot.presentation.dto.job.CompanyResponse;
16	import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
17	import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
18	import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
19	
20	import java.time.Instant;
21	import java.util.List;
22	import java.util.Map;
23	import java.util.UUID;
24	
25	@Service
26	@RequiredArgsConstructor
27	public class AdminService {
28	
29	    public static final String KEY_DEPLOY_AI_E2E = "deploy_ai_e2e_enabled";
30	    public static final String KEY_DEPLOY_E2E = "deploy_e2e_enabled";
31	
32	    private final PromptTemplateRepository promptRepository;
33	    private final PromptVersionRepository promptVersionRepository;
34	    private final PromptHistoryRepository promptHistoryRepository;
35	    private final ForbiddenExpressionRepository forbiddenRepository;
36	    private final UserRepository userRepository;
37	    private final CompanyRepository companyRepository;
38	    private final CompanyMapper companyMapper;
39	    private final AiUsageLogRepository usageLogRepository;
40	    private final SystemSettingRepository systemSettingRepository;
41	    private final PromptServiceClient promptServiceClient;
42	
43	    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
44	    public List<PromptAdminResponse> listPrompts() {
45	        return promptRepository.findAll().stream()
46	                .map(p -> new PromptAdminResponse(p.getId(), p.getType(), p.getName(), p.getDescription(), p.getActiveVersionId()))
47	                .toList();
48	    }
49	
50	    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
51	    public List<PromptVersionResponse> listPromptVersions(UUID templateId) {
52	        getPromptTemplate(templateId);
53	        return promptVersionRepository.findByPromptTemplateIdOrderByVersionNumberDesc(templateId).stream()
54	                .map(this::toVersionResponse)
55	                .toList();
56	    }
57	
58	    @Transactional
59	    public PromptVersionResponse createPromptVersion(UUID templateId, PromptVersionCreateRequest req, UUID adminId) {
60	        PromptTemplate template = getPromptTemplate(templateId);
61	        int nextVersion = promptVersionRepository.findTopByPromptTemplateIdOrderByVersionNumberDesc(templateId)
62	                .map(v -> v.getVersionNumber() + 1).orElse(1);
63	
64	        String persona = req.personaPrompt();
65	        String guard = req.guardPrompt();
66	        String task = req.taskPrompt();
67	        String output = req.outputPrompt();
68	        String systemPrompt = PromptSections.compose(persona, guard, task, output);
69	
70	        PromptVersion version = promptVersionRepository.save(PromptVersion.builder()
71	                .promptTemplateId(templateId)
72	                .versionNumber(nextVersion)
73	                .personaPrompt(persona)
74	                .guardPrompt(guard)
75	                .taskPrompt(task)
76	                .outputPrompt(output)
77	                .systemPrompt(systemPrompt)
78	                .userPrompt(req.userPrompt())
79	                .createdBy(adminId)
80	                .build());
81	
82	        promptHistoryRepository.save(PromptHistory.builder()
83	                .promptVersionId(version.getId())
84	                .action("CREATE")
85	                .changedBy(adminId)
86	                .changeDetail(Map.of("version_number", nextVersion))
87	                .build());
88	
89	        template.setActiveVersionId(version.getId());
90	        version.setActive(true);
91	        promptVersionRepository.findByPromptTemplateIdOrderByVersionNumberDesc(templateId).stream()
92	                .filter(v -> !v.getId().equals(version.getId()))
93	                .forEach(v -> { v.setActive(false); promptVersionRepository.save(v); });
94	
95	        return toVersionResponse(version);
96	    }
97	
98	    @Transactional
99	    public PromptVersionResponse activatePromptVersion(UUID templateId, UUID versionId, UUID adminId) {
100	        PromptTemplate template = getPromptTemplate(templateId);
101	        PromptVersion version = promptVersionRepository.findById(versionId)
102	                .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(ErrorCode.NOT_FOUND));
103	        if (!version.getPromptTemplateId().equals(templateId)) {
104	            throw new BusinessException(ErrorCode.INVALID_INPUT, "Version does not belong to template");
105	        }
106	
107	        promptVersionRepository.findByPromptTemplateIdOrderByVersionNumberDesc(templateId)
108	                .forEach(v -> { v.setActive(v.getId().equals(versionId)); promptVersionRepository.save(v); });
109	
110	        template.setActiveVersionId(versionId);
111	        promptRepository.save(template);
112	
113	        promptHistoryRepository.save(PromptHistory.builder()
114	                .promptVersionId(versionId)
115	                .action("ACTIVATE")
116	                .changedBy(adminId)
117	                .build());
118	
119	        return toVersionResponse(version);
120	    }
121	
122	    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
123	    public PromptTestResponse testPrompt(PromptTestRequest req) {
124	        String systemPrompt = resolveSystemPrompt(req);
125	        Map<String, Object> result = promptServiceClient.testPrompt(
126	                req.promptType(), systemPrompt, req.userPrompt(), req.variables());
127	        Object testResult = result.get("result");
128	        return new PromptTestResponse(testResult != null ? String.valueOf(testResult) : "no result");
129	    }
130	
131	    private String resolveSystemPrompt(PromptTestRequest req) {
132	        if (req.systemPrompt() != null && !req.systemPrompt().isBlank()) {
133	            return req.systemPrompt();
134	        }
135	        if (req.personaPrompt() != null || req.guardPrompt() != null
136	                || req.taskPrompt() != null || req.outputPrompt() != null) {
137	            return PromptSections.compose(
138	                    req.personaPrompt() != null ? req.personaPrompt() : "",
139	                    req.guardPrompt() != null ? req.guardPrompt() : "",
140	                    req.taskPrompt() != null ? req.taskPrompt() : "",
141	                    req.outputPrompt() != null ? req.outputPrompt() : "");
142	        }
143	        throw new BusinessException(ErrorCode.INVALID_INPUT, "system prompt or sections required");
144	    }
145	
146	    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
147	    public List<ForbiddenExpressionResponse> listForbidden() {
148	        return forbiddenRepository.findAll().stream()
149	                .map(f -> new ForbiddenExpressionResponse(f.getId(), f.getExpression(), f.getSuggestion(), f.getSeverity(), f.isEnabled()))
150	                .toList();
151	    }
152	
153	    @Transactional
154	    public ForbiddenExpressionResponse createForbidden(ForbiddenCreateRequest req) {
155	        ForbiddenExpression f = forbiddenRepository.save(ForbiddenExpression.builder()
156	                .expression(req.expression())
157	                .suggestion(req.suggestion())
158	                .severity(req.severity() != null ? req.severity() : "WARNING")
159	                .build());
160	        return new ForbiddenExpressionResponse(f.getId(), f.getExpression(), f.getSuggestion(), f.getSeverity(), f.isEnabled());
161	    }
162	
163	    @Transactional
164	    public void deleteForbidden(UUID id) {
165	        forbiddenRepository.deleteById(id);
166	    }
167	
168	    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
169	    public List<UserAdminResponse> listUsers() {
170	        return userRepository.findAll().stream()
171	                .map(u -> new UserAdminResponse(u.getId(), u.getEmail(), u.getRole().name(), u.isEnabled(), u.getCreatedAt()))
172	                .toList();
173	    }
174	
175	    @Transactional
176	    public UserAdminResponse updateUserRole(UUID id, UserRoleUpdateRequest req) {
177	        User user = userRepository.findById(id).orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(ErrorCode.NOT_FOUND));
178	        user.setRole(UserRole.valueOf(req.role()));
179	        return new UserAdminResponse(user.getId(), user.getEmail(), user.getRole().name(), user.isEnabled(), user.getCreatedAt());
180	    }
181	
182	    @Transactional
183	    public UserAdminResponse updateUserEnabled(UUID id, UserEnabledUpdateRequest req) {
184	        User user = userRepository.findById(id).orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(ErrorCode.NOT_FOUND));
185	        user.setEnabled(req.enabled());
186	        return new UserAdminResponse(user.getId(), user.getEmail(), user.getRole().name(), user.isEnabled(), user.getCreatedAt());
187	    }
188	
189	    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
190	    public List<CompanyResponse> listCompanies() {
191	        return companyRepository.findAll().stream().map(companyMapper::toResponse).toList();
192	    }
193	
194	    @Transactional
195	    public CompanyResponse updateCompany(UUID id, CompanyUpdateRequest req) {
196	        Company company = companyRepository.findById(id).orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(ErrorCode.NOT_FOUND));
197	        if (req.coreValues() != null) company.setCoreValues(req.coreValues());
198	        if (req.talentProfile() != null) company.setTalentProfile(req.talentProfile());
199	        if (req.techStack() != null) company.setTechStack(req.techStack());
200	        if (req.culture() != null) company.setCulture(req.culture());
201	        if (req.hiringKeywords() != null) company.setHiringKeywords(req.hiringKeywords());
202	        return companyMapper.toResponse(companyRepository.save(company));
203	    }
204	
205	    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
206	    public List<AiLogResponse> listAiLogs() {
207	        return usageLogRepository.findTop100ByOrderByCreatedAtDesc().stream()
208	                .map(l -> new AiLogResponse(
209	                        l.getId(),
210	                        l.getUserId(),
211	                        l.getService(),
212	                        l.getOperation(),
213	                        l.getModel(),
214	                        l.getInputTokens(),
215	                        l.getOutputTokens(),
216	                        l.getDurationMs(),
217	                        l.getStatus(),
218	                        l.getErrorMessage(),
219	                        l.getMetadata() != null ? l.getMetadata() : Map.of(),
220	                        l.getCreatedAt()))
221	                .toList();
222	    }
223	
224	    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
225	    public DeployCiSettingsResponse getDeployCiSettings() {
226	        return new DeployCiSettingsResponse(
227	                readBooleanSetting(KEY_DEPLOY_AI_E2E, true),
228	                readBooleanSetting(KEY_DEPLOY_E2E, true),
229	                latestSettingUpdatedAt()
230	        );
231	    }
232	
233	    @Transactional
234	    public DeployCiSettingsResponse updateDeployCiSettings(DeployCiSettingsUpdateRequest req, UUID adminId) {
235	        if (req.deployAiE2eEnabled() != null) {
236	            upsertSetting(KEY_DEPLOY_AI_E2E, req.deployAiE2eEnabled(), adminId);
237	        }
238	        if (req.deployE2eEnabled() != null) {
239	            upsertSetting(KEY_DEPLOY_E2E, req.deployE2eEnabled(), adminId);
240	        }
241	        return getDeployCiSettings();
242	    }
243	
244	    private boolean readBooleanSetting(String key, boolean defaultValue) {
245	        return systemSettingRepository.findById(key)
246	                .map(s -> parseBoolean(s.getSettingValue(), defaultValue))
247	                .orElse(defaultValue);
248	    }
249	
250	    private boolean parseBoolean(String value, boolean defaultValue) {
251	        if (value == null) {
252	            return defaultValue;
253	        }
254	        String normalized = value.trim().toLowerCase();
255	        if ("true".equals(normalized) || "1".equals(normalized) || "yes".equals(normalized)) {
256	            return true;
257	        }
258	        if ("false".equals(normalized) || "0".equals(normalized) || "no".equals(normalized)) {
259	            return false;
260	        }
261	        return defaultValue;
262	    }
263	
264	    private void upsertSetting(String key, boolean enabled, UUID adminId) {
265	        SystemSetting setting = systemSettingRepository.findById(key)
266	                .orElse(SystemSetting.builder().settingKey(key).build());
267	        setting.setSettingValue(Boolean.toString(enabled));
268	        setting.setUpdatedBy(adminId);
269	        systemSettingRepository.save(setting);
270	    }
271	
272	    private Instant latestSettingUpdatedAt() {
273	        return systemSettingRepository.findAll().stream()
274	                .map(SystemSetting::getUpdatedAt)
275	                .filter(java.util.Objects::nonNull)
276	                .max(Instant::compareTo)
277	                .orElse(null);
278	    }
279	
280	    private PromptTemplate getPromptTemplate(UUID id) {
281	        return promptRepository.findById(id)
282	                .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessException(ErrorCode.NOT_FOUND, "Prompt template not found"));
283	    }
284	
285	    private PromptVersionResponse toVersionResponse(PromptVersion v) {
286	        return new PromptVersionResponse(
287	                v.getId(),
288	                v.getPromptTemplateId(),
289	                v.getVersionNumber(),
290	                v.getPersonaPrompt(),
291	                v.getGuardPrompt(),
292	                v.getTaskPrompt(),
293	                v.getOutputPrompt(),
294	                v.getSystemPrompt(),
295	                v.getUserPrompt(),
296	                v.isActive());
297	    }
298	}

```tsx
import { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next';
import { api } from '@/lib/api';
import { PageHeader } from '@/components/PageHeader';
import { SearchBar } from '@/components/common/search-bar';
import { DataTableCard } from '@/components/common/data-table-card';
import { PaginationControls } from '@/components/common/pagination-controls';
import { SortableTableHead } from '@/components/common/sortable-table-head';
import { TableSkeletonRows } from '@/components/common/table-skeleton';
import { EmptyState } from '@/components/common/empty-state';
import { useUrlPagination } from '@/hooks/use-url-pagination';
import { useUrlSort } from '@/hooks/use-url-sort';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from '@/components/ui/table';

type SkillRow = { id: number; name: string; category: string };

export default function SkillCatalogPage() {
  const { t } = useTranslation();
  const queryClient = useQueryClient();
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
  const [name, setName] = useState('');
  const [category, setCategory] = useState('');
  const [editingId, setEditingId] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [editName, setEditName] = useState('');
  const [editCategory, setEditCategory] = useState('');

  const { data = [], isLoading } = useQuery({ queryKey: ['admin-skill-catalog'], queryFn: api.listSkillCatalog });

  const categories = useMemo(
    () => Array.from(new Set((data as SkillRow[]).map((s) => s.category))).sort(),
    [data],
  );

  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
    const q = search.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!q) return data as SkillRow[];
    return (data as SkillRow[]).filter(
      (s) => s.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) || s.category.toLowerCase().includes(q),
    );
  }, [data, search]);

  const comparators = useMemo(
    () => ({
      name: (a: SkillRow, b: SkillRow) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name),
      category: (a: SkillRow, b: SkillRow) => a.category.localeCompare(b.category),
    }),
    [],
  );

  const { sorted, sortKey, direction, toggleSort } = useUrlSort(filtered, comparators, 'category');
  const { page, setPage, totalPages, paginated, from, to, total } = useUrlPagination(sorted, 20);

  const invalidate = () => queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['admin-skill-catalog'] });

  const createMutation = useMutation({
    mutationFn: () => api.createSkillCatalog(name.trim(), category.trim()),
    onSuccess: () => {
      invalidate();
      setName('');
      setCategory('');
    },
  });

  const updateMutation = useMutation({
    mutationFn: (id: number) => api.updateSkillCatalog(id, { name: editName.trim(), category: editCategory.trim() }),
    onSuccess: () => {
      invalidate();
      setEditingId(null);
    },
  });

  const deleteMutation = useMutation({
    mutationFn: (id: number) => api.deleteSkillCatalog(id),
    onSuccess: invalidate,
  });

  const startEdit = (row: SkillRow) => {
    setEditingId(row.id);
    setEditName(row.name);
    setEditCategory(row.category);
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <PageHeader title={t('skillCatalog.title')} />
      <Card className="max-w-lg">
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle>{t('common.add')}</CardTitle>
        </CardHeader>
        <form
          onSubmit={(e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            if (!name.trim() || !category.trim()) return;
            createMutation.mutate();
          }}
        >
          <CardContent className="space-y-3">
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label>{t('skillCatalog.name')}</Label>
              <Input value={name} onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)} required />
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label>{t('skillCatalog.category')}</Label>
              <Input
                value={category}
                onChange={(e) => setCategory(e.target.value)}
                list="skill-catalog-categories"
                placeholder={t('skillCatalog.categoryPlaceholder')}
                required
              />
              <datalist id="skill-catalog-categories">
                {categories.map((c) => (
                  <option key={c} value={c} />
                ))}
              </datalist>
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{t('skillCatalog.categoryHint')}</p>
            </div>
            <Button type="submit" disabled={createMutation.isPending}>{t('common.add')}</Button>
          </CardContent>
        </form>
      </Card>

      {isLoading ? (
        <DataTableCard>
          <Table>
            <TableHeader>
              <TableRow>
                <TableHead>{t('skillCatalog.name')}</TableHead>
              </TableRow>
            </TableHeader>
            <TableSkeletonRows rows={5} cols={3} />
          </Table>
        </DataTableCard>
      ) : (data as SkillRow[]).length === 0 ? (
        <EmptyState title={t('skillCatalog.empty')} />
      ) : (
        <DataTableCard
          toolbar={<SearchBar value={search} onChange={setSearch} placeholder={t('common.searchPlaceholder')} />}
          footer={
            <PaginationControls page={page} totalPages={totalPages} from={from} to={to} total={total} onPageChange={setPage} className="w-full" />
          }
        >
          {paginated.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="p-8 text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground">{t('common.noResults')}</p>
          ) : (
            <Table>
              <TableHeader>
                <TableRow>
                  <SortableTableHead label={t('skillCatalog.name')} sortKey="name" activeKey={sortKey} direction={direction} onSort={toggleSort} />
                  <SortableTableHead label={t('skillCatalog.category')} sortKey="category" activeKey={sortKey} direction={direction} onSort={toggleSort} />
                  <TableHead className="text-right">{t('common.edit')}</TableHead>
                </TableRow>
              </TableHeader>
              <TableBody>
                {paginated.map((s) => (
                  <TableRow key={s.id}>
                    {editingId === s.id ? (
                      <>
                        <TableCell>
                          <Input value={editName} onChange={(e) => setEditName(e.target.value)} className="h-8" />
                        </TableCell>
                        <TableCell>
                          <Input
                            value={editCategory}
                            onChange={(e) => setEditCategory(e.target.value)}
                            list="skill-catalog-categories"
                            className="h-8"
                          />
                        </TableCell>
                        <TableCell className="text-right space-x-2">
                          <Button
                            size="sm"
                            disabled={updateMutation.isPending}
                            onClick={() => updateMutation.mutate(s.id)}
                          >
                            {t('common.save')}
                          </Button>
                          <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setEditingId(null)}>
                            {t('common.cancel')}
                          </Button>
                        </TableCell>
                      </>
                    ) : (
                      <>
                        <TableCell className="font-medium">{s.name}</TableCell>
                        <TableCell className="text-muted-foreground">{s.category}</TableCell>
                        <TableCell className="text-right space-x-2">
                          <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => startEdit(s)}>
                            {t('common.edit')}
                          </Button>
                          <Button
                            variant="ghost"
                            size="sm"
                            className="text-destructive"
                            onClick={() => deleteMutation.mutate(s.id)}
                          >
                            {t('common.delete')}
                          </Button>
                        </TableCell>
                      </>
                    )}
                  </TableRow>
                ))}
              </TableBody>
            </Table>
          )}
        </DataTableCard>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

All three apps build cleanly. Summary:

**백엔드**
- `V24__skill_catalog_expand.sql` — Stack Overflow Developer Survey 2024 데이터 기준 ~65개 스킬 추가 (Backend/Frontend/Mobile 신규/Database/Infra·DevOps/AI·Data/Tools), 총 카탈로그 ~145개
- `Mobile` 카테고리 신설 (Flutter, React Native, Swift 등)
- `AdminController`/`AdminService`에 skill-catalog CRUD 추가: `GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/v1/admin/skill-catalog` (`hasRole("ADMIN")`로 이미 보호됨)

**관리자 화면** (`resume-admin`)
- 새 페이지 `SkillCatalogPage.tsx` (사이드바 "스킬 카탈로그" 메뉴 추가) — 기존 "금지 표현" 페이지와 동일한 패턴(검색·정렬·페이지네이션)
- 스킬 추가 폼: 이름 + 분류(자유 텍스트, 기존 분류는 datalist로 자동완성 제안 — **새 카테고리도 그 자리에서 자유롭게 추가 가능**)
- 목록에서 인라인 수정(이름/분류)·삭제 지원

이제 `resume-api` 재시작(Flyway V23+V24 적용) 후 `/admin`에서 스킬을 직접 추가/수정/삭제하실 수 있고, 새 카테고리도 자유롭게 만드실 수 있습니다. 사용자 쪽 `/settings` 스킬 선택기는 이 DB 데이터를 그대로 읽으므로 바로 반영됩니다.

## 경험 라이브러리가 왜 생겼는지

ResumePilot의 핵심 원칙 1번이 "AI는 사용자 경험을 **지어내지 않는다** — 근거 부족 시 생성하지 않음"입니다(`CLAUDE.md`). 즉 자소서를 AI가 통째로 창작하면 안 되고, 반드시 **사용자가 실제로 입력한 경험 데이터에 근거**해서만 문장을 만들어야 합니다.

그래서 구조가 이렇게 나뉩니다.

1. **경험 라이브러리** — STAR 기법(situation/task/action/result)으로 잘게 쪼갠 "원재료" 데이터베이스. 프로젝트 하나, 성과 하나, 문제해결 사례 하나씩 개별 레코드로 저장
2. **RAG 임베딩** — 각 경험이 pgvector에 임베딩되어, 공고의 요구 키워드와 의미 기반으로 매칭됨 (`rag-service`)
3. **AI 생성 시점** — 공고 분석 결과와 가장 유사한 경험들을 RAG로 검색해 오고, 그 경험 텍스트를 근거로만 자소서 문단을 생성

즉 자소서 하나의 큰 텍스트 덩어리로 관리하면 "이 공고엔 이 경험이 어울리는지" 판단이 안 되기 때문에, 경험을 원자 단위로 쪼개서 **공고별로 재조합**할 수 있게 만든 게 경험 라이브러리입니다. 지난번에 나눈 학력/경력/자격증은 이 서술형 재료와 성격이 달라서 대시보드로 분리했던 거고요.

## 데이터 등록 완료

`gnsdlfwjs@gmail.com` 계정(우분투 DB, 화학물질관리시스템/CMS 프로젝트 경력 맥락에 맞춰 작성)에 경험 5건을 등록했습니다.

| 타입 | 제목 |
|---|---|
| PROJECT | 화학물질관리시스템(CMS) 신규 구축 및 고도화 |
| PROBLEM_SOLVING | MSDS/GHS 다국어 규제 대응 모듈 개선 |
| COLLABORATION | 고객사·협력사와의 ERP/SAP 연동 협업 |
| LEADERSHIP | SI 프로젝트 파트리더로서 일정·품질 관리 |
| TECHNOLOGY | AI 도구를 활용한 개발 생산성 향상 |

각각 역할·기여·성과·수치·STAR 4단계까지 채워 넣었고, 스킬 태그도 붙여뒀습니다. `/experiences` 페이지에서 확인해 보세요. 다만 RAG 임베딩은 자동 생성되지 않았을 수 있으니(생성/수정 시 `RagService.embedExperience` 호출), 워크스페이스에서 "추천" 버튼을 눌러 추천이 안 뜨면 각 경험 상세에서 임베딩을 한 번 트리거해야 할 수 있습니다.

56	          placeholder={t('writingStyle.placeholder')}
57	          className="min-h-48 resize-y"
58	        />

63

97	    </PageShell>

100

105	      <p className="mt-1 font-medium">{value || '-'}</p>
106	    </div>
107	  );
108	}
109	
110	function TagGroup({

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-13 13:41:56Z)**_

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-13 13:42:02Z)**_

`/writing-style`는 **본인의 글쓰기 스타일을 AI에 학습시키는 페이지**입니다.

**사용법**
1. 이미 작성해둔 자소서가 있으면 상단 "불러오기" 섹션에서 버튼 클릭 한 번으로 그 내용을 입력창에 채울 수 있고, 없으면 직접 자기소개서/에세이 등 본인 글을 붙여넣습니다.
2. "분석" 버튼 클릭 → `analyzeWritingStyle` API가 텍스트를 LLM에 보내 문체를 분석합니다.
3. 결과로 나오는 항목:
   - **문장 스타일** / **톤**
   - **존댓말 사용 여부**
   - **평균 문장 길이**
   - **표현 스타일** 요약 문단
   - **자주 쓰는 단어**, **접속사** 태그 목록

**용도**: 여기서 분석된 스타일이 `/settings`에 저장되는 `WritingStyleResponse`로 남고, 이후 `/workspace`에서 AI가 자소서를 생성할 때 이 스타일 프로필을 참고해서 "AI가 쓴 티가 덜 나는", 본인 말투에 가까운 문장을 생성하도록 돕는 용도예요 — AI 흔적 탐지(`aiDetection`) 회피와도 연결됩니다.

한 번 분석해두면 최신 결과가 계속 유지되고, 다른 글로 다시 분석하면 갱신되는 구조입니다.

1	package com.resumepilot.application.rag;
2	
3	import com.resumepilot.domain.experience.Experience;
4	import com.resumepilot.domain.experience.ExperienceRepository;
5	import com.resumepilot.infrastructure.ai.RagServiceClient;
6	import com.resumepilot.presentation.dto.rag.ExperienceRecommendResponse;
7	import com.resumepilot.presentation.dto.rag.RagSearchRequest;
8	import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
9	import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
10	import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
11	
12	import java.util.*;
13	
14	@Service
15	@RequiredArgsConstructor
16	public class RagService {
17	
18	    private final RagServiceClient ragServiceClient;
19	    private final ExperienceRepository experienceRepository;
20	
21	    public List<Map<String, Object>> search(UUID userId, RagSearchRequest request) {
22	        return ragServiceClient.search(userId, request.query(), request.entityTypes(), request.topK());
23	    }
24	
25	    @Transactional(readOnly = true)
26	    public List<ExperienceRecommendResponse> recommendExperiences(UUID userId, List<String> keywords, int topK) {
27	        String query = String.join(" ", keywords);
28	        List<Map<String, Object>> results = ragServiceClient.search(
29	                userId, query, List.of("EXPERIENCE"), topK);
30	
31	        List<ExperienceRecommendResponse> recommendations = new ArrayList<>();
32	        for (Map<String, Object> r : results) {
33	            UUID expId = UUID.fromString(String.valueOf(r.get("entity_id")));
34	            experienceRepository.findById(expId).ifPresent(exp -> {
35	                double score = r.get("score") instanceof Number n ? n.doubleValue() : 0;
36	                recommendations.add(new ExperienceRecommendResponse(
37	                        exp.getId(), exp.getTitle(), exp.getType().name(),
38	                        exp.getDescription(), exp.getResult(), score
39	                ));
40	            });
41	        }
42	        return recommendations;
43	    }
44	
45	    public void embedExperience(UUID userId, Experience exp) {
46	        String text = String.join("\n",
47	                exp.getTitle(),
48	                Optional.ofNullable(exp.getDescription()).orElse(""),
49	                Optional.ofNullable(exp.getRole()).orElse(""),
50	                Optional.ofNullable(exp.getResult()).orElse(""),
51	                Optional.ofNullable(exp.getStarAction()).orElse("")
52	        );
53	        ragServiceClient.createEmbedding(userId, "EXPERIENCE", exp.getId(), text);
54	    }
55	
56	    public void embedResume(UUID userId, UUID versionId, String content) {
57	        ragServiceClient.createEmbedding(userId, "RESUME", versionId, content);
58	    }
59	}

검색이 정상 작동합니다. 원인과 조치 확인해드릴게요.

**원인**: 제가 지난번 경험 5건을 DB에 직접 SQL로 넣었는데, 정상 경로(API 생성/수정)를 안 거쳐서 **pgvector 임베딩이 생성되지 않았습니다.** 그래서 RAG 검색이 빈 결과만 반환했고, 그 결과:
- "관련 경험 추천" 클릭 → 빈 배열 → 화면에 아무것도 안 뜸
- AI 생성 → RAG로 가져올 경험이 없음 → 핵심 원칙("경험을 지어내지 않는다")에 따라 "내용이 부족하여 생성하지 않음"으로 거부

**조치**: 방금 5건 모두 rag-service에 직접 임베딩 생성했고, 검색 테스트해보니 5건 다 정상적으로 매칭됩니다 (점수 0.48~0.60).

이제 다시 확인해 주세요.
1. `/experiences`에서 아무 항목이나 클릭해 저장(수정) 한 번 눌러도 되고, 그냥 지금 상태로도
2. `/workspace`에서 "관련 경험 추천" 눌러보시면 5건이 뜰 겁니다
3. 자소서 생성도 이제 정상적으로 될 거예요

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-13 13:53:43Z)**_

**증분 컴파일(incremental compilation)**이란 Gradle이 소스 전체를 매번 다시 컴파일하지 않고, "바뀐 파일과 그에 의존하는 파일만" 골라서 다시 컴파일하는 최적화 기능이에요. 빌드 속도를 빠르게 하려고 이전 빌드의 컴파일 상태(어떤 클래스가 어떤 클래스에 의존하는지 등)를 캐시에 저장해뒀다가 재사용합니다.

**왜 계속 깨졌나**: 이 프로젝트는 어노테이션 프로세서를 3개(Lombok, MapStruct, QueryDSL) 동시에 씁니다. 이 조합은 잘 알려진 취약점이 있어요 — Lombok이 소스를 변형(getter/setter 생성)하는 시점과 MapStruct/QueryDSL이 그걸 읽어서 코드를 생성하는 시점의 순서가, 증분 빌드의 "일부만 재컴파일" 경로에서 캐시된 이전 상태와 어긋나면 MapStruct가 절반만 처리된 타입(`ArrayList` 같은)을 보고 실패합니다. `clean`으로 캐시를 통째로 날리면 항상 고쳐졌던 이유가 이거예요.

**꺼서 뭐가 되나**: `options.incremental = false`로 끄면 매번 전체 소스를 다시 컴파일합니다. 즉:
- 장점: 이 캐시 불일치 문제 자체가 원천 차단됨 (같은 원인으로 재발 안 함)
- 단점: 빌드 시간이 조금 늘어남 — 다만 이 프로젝트 규모(수백 개 파일)면 체감상 몇 초 차이라, `bootRun`마다 겪던 "또 clean 해야 하나" 스트레스보다는 훨씬 낫습니다

방금 두 번 연속 clean 없이 빌드해서 재현 안 되는 것까지 확인했습니다. 이제부터는 `.\gradlew.bat bootRun`만 하시면 되고, 혹시 또 이 에러가 나면 그건 다른 원인일 가능성이 높으니 그때 다시 봐드릴게요.

---

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-13 13:57:52Z)**_

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-5 2026-07-13 13:58:01Z)**_

완전히 뿌리 뽑는 방법은 이미 적용한 것— `options.incremental = false`가 그겁니다. 부연설명 드리면:

**왜 "증분을 유지하면서" 고칠 방법이 없는지**: Lombok/MapStruct/QueryDSL 세 어노테이션 프로세서는 Gradle의 증분 어노테이션 처리 모델(각 프로세서가 "isolating"인지 "aggregating"인지 선언해서 부분 재컴파일 가능 여부를 Gradle에 알려주는 방식)을 제대로 지원하지 않습니다. 이건 이 프로젝트 설정 문제가 아니라 **QueryDSL apt / MapStruct 프로세서 자체의 알려진 상위(upstream) 한계**예요 — 셋을 같이 쓰면서 증분 컴파일까지 안전하게 되는 조합은 사실상 없습니다.

그래서 선택지는 두 가지뿐이었어요:
1. **증분 컴파일을 끈다** (지금 한 것) — 매번 전체 재컴파일, 하지만 캐시 불일치 자체가 발생할 수 없음
2. 어노테이션 프로세서 중 하나를 뺀다 — QueryDSL이나 MapStruct를 제거해야 하는데, 둘 다 실제로 코드에서 쓰고 있어서(Q타입 쿼리, DTO 매핑) 불가능

즉 지금 적용한 게 임시방편이 아니라 **이 조합에서 나올 수 있는 유일한 근본 해결책**입니다. "증분도 유지하고 에러도 없앤다"는 선택지 자체가 이 세 프로세서 조합에서는 존재하지 않아요. 굳이 더 뿌리를 뽑으려면 QueryDSL을 다른 매핑 방식(예: Spring Data JPA Specification)으로 바꾸는 정도의 큰 리팩터링이 필요한데, 지금 겪는 불편(재시작마다 컴파일 몇 초 더 걸리는 것) 대비 得보다 실이 훨씬 큽니다.

원인을 찾았습니다 — **백엔드는 이미 정상입니다.** 방금 실제 계정 ID로 동일한 조건을 직접 재현해봤더니 정상적으로 생성됐어요 (5개 경험이 반영된 자소서, `insufficient: false`).

화면 캡처를 다시 보니 위쪽에 "**이전 AI 생성 결과를 불러왔습니다**"라는 문구가 있죠 — 이게 힌트입니다. 워크스페이스는 마지막 생성 결과를 브라우저에 임시저장(draft)해두는데, 지금 보이는 "내용이 부족하여 생성하지 않음"은 **경험을 등록하기 전, 예전에 실패했던 결과가 그대로 캐시되어 남아있는 것**이지 방금 새로 생성한 게 아닙니다.

우측 상단 **"초기화"** 버튼을 눌러 캐시된 초안을 지우시거나, 그냥 **"3. 자기소개서 생성"** 버튼을 다시 눌러보세요. 새로 생성되면 이번엔 정상적으로 나올 겁니다.
